title: Statistical Adversaries: Natural Backdoor-like Features in Vision Datasets
summary: Model-specific adversarial attacks have been extensively studied. We study a different failure mode: naturally occurring statistical signals in vision data that can behave like backdoor-like triggers without being maliciously inserted. We call these signals statistical adversaries. We analyse Imagenet to find patterns that are strongly linked to certain labels. We then use statistical controls to remove random correlations from our candidate signals. Finally, we demonstrate that these signals directly and predictably alter model predictions. These statistical adversaries are more targeted than generic corruptions and transfer across different model architectures. This suggests that some vulnerabilities are driven by dataset structure and distribution rather than a single model's idiosyncrasies. We conclude that ordinary datasets can contain exploitable adversarial surfaces even in the absence of poisoning, and suggest that dataset audits should treat spurious structure not only as a source of bias or interpretability failure, but also as a latent attack surface for vision models.

AI.tldr: 本文发现并系统研究了视觉数据中天然存在的统计对抗信号——即与某些标签强相关的统计模式，这些模式无需恶意植入即可像后门触发器一样影响模型预测，且具有跨架构的可迁移性，揭示了数据集本身的结构性对抗面。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击研究主要关注模型特定的恶意攻击，而忽视了自然数据分布中是否存在固有的、可被利用的统计对抗信号，这一问题涉及数据集本身的结构性脆弱性而非后门投毒或模型特异性缺陷。
AI.method: 作者在ImageNet中搜索与特定标签存在强关联的统计模式作为候选信号，然后通过统计控制方法移除候选信号与标签之间的随机相关性，最后验证这些纯净信号是否能直接且可预测地改变模型的预测结果。
AI.result: 实验发现这些统计对抗信号比通用图像损坏更具目标针对性，并且可以跨不同模型架构迁移。这表明此类脆弱性源于数据集的结构与分布特性，而非单一模型的参数特征导致的。
AI.conclusion: 普通数据集中即使没有恶意投毒，也可能天然存在可被利用的对抗面。研究建议数据集审核不仅应将虚假统计结构视为偏差或可解释性问题，还应将其视为视觉模型的潜在攻击面。

title: Harnessing Generative Image Models for Training-Free Primitive Shape Abstraction
summary: Representing 3D shapes as compact sets of geometric primitives is fundamental to robotics, simulation, and scene understanding. Generative image models trained at scale have recently emerged as generalist visual learners that can identify and segment object parts directly in the image domain, across arbitrary categories and without task-specific training. Adapting such models to downstream tasks typically requires fine-tuning; we ask whether their pretrained capability can instead be harnessed directly, without any training, and answer affirmatively with a training-free harness. Our pipeline renders multi-view images of a 3D object, uses a vision-language model to analyze its semantic parts, prompts a generative image model to paint a color-coded part segmentation mask, reprojects it onto the geometry, and fits a superquadric primitive to each part via parameter optimization. The approach contains no learned parameters: it is category-agnostic and orientation-invariant, properties that previous learning-based models struggled with. Its accuracy ceiling rises with future generative-model improvements, which we confirm with a ground-truth segmentation study showing that part segmentation, not primitive fitting, is the current accuracy bottleneck. On HumanPrim and Toys4K, our method achieves the lowest Chamfer distance among all evaluated methods, using 5--9 primitives per object on average.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练的、利用预训练通用图像模型进行3D形状超二次曲面原理解析的方法，通过多视图渲染、VLM语义分析、生成模型分割和参数优化拟合原始形状，在HumanPrim和Toys4K数据集上取得了领先的Chamfer距离。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式图像模型具有通用视觉学习能力，可跨类别识别和分割物体零件，但将其适配到下游任务通常需要微调；本文探索能否直接利用其预训练能力进行3D形状解析而无需任何训练，以解决现有学习方法依赖特定类别、对朝向敏感等局限。
AI.method: 提出一种训练无关的流水线：对3D物体渲染多视图图像，使用视觉-语言模型分析语义零件，提示生成式图像模型生成彩色编码零件分割掩码，将掩码反投影到几何上，并通过参数优化为每个零件拟合一个超二次曲面（superquadric）原始形状。整个流程不含任何可学习参数。
AI.result: 在HumanPrim和Toys4K数据集上，该方法在所有评估方法中取得了最低的Chamfer距离，平均每个物体使用5–9个原始形状。消融实验表明，零件分割而非原始形状拟合是当前精度的主要瓶颈，验证了该方法随生成模型性能提升而持续改进的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了无需训练的通用图像模型可有效用于3D形状原始解析，具备类别无关和朝向不变特性，克服了以往学习方法的关键缺陷；未来生成模型的进步将直接提升该方法的精度上限，为无训练迁移通用视觉模型到3D任务提供了可行范式。

title: Patch Knowledge Transfer for Efficient AI-Generated Image Quality Assessment
summary: With the rapid advancement of image generation technologies, perceptual quality assessment of AI-generated images has emerged as a crucial research direction in computer vision. The core challenge of this task lies in achieving efficient quality assessment for massive generated images. Current mainstream approaches exhibit two key limitations: 1) Methods employing complex feature extraction strategies, while improving performance, incur prohibitive computational costs that hinder real-time inference; 2) Simple image scaling-based solutions, despite their computational efficiency, demonstrate significantly inferior assessment accuracy. To address this critical issue, we propose Patch Knowledge Transfer (PKT), a knowledge distillation-based optimization framework that achieves synergistic optimization of visual representation capability and inference efficiency through an innovative multi-level knowledge transfer mechanism. Specifically, we design a dual-model architecture: a teacher model with local-global hybrid processing provides high-quality supervision signals, while a student model relying solely on global processing efficiently inherits the teacher's representation capacity through multi-level supervision. Extensive experiments conducted on 4 AIGIQA databases demonstrate that the PKT framework enables the student model to maintain performance comparable to the teacher while reducing computational costs by 67.7\%. Furthermore, compared to existing methods, our approach achieves a superior balance between model efficiency and assessment accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出Patch Knowledge Transfer (PKT)框架，通过多层级知识蒸馏机制，使仅使用全局处理的学生模型在AI生成图像质量评估中保持与局部-全局混合处理的教师模型相当的性能，同时计算成本降低67.7%，实现了评估效率与精度的更优平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成图像质量评估方法存在两难困境：采用复杂特征提取策略的方法虽性能优异但计算成本过高，难以实现实时推理；而基于简单图像缩放的方法虽计算高效但评估精度显著不足。因此，亟需一种能够同时优化视觉表示能力与推理效率的方法。
AI.method: 提出基于知识蒸馏的Patch Knowledge Transfer (PKT)优化框架，采用双模型架构：教师模型采用局部-全局混合处理策略以提供高质量监督信号，学生模型仅依赖全局处理并通过多层级监督机制高效继承教师模型的表征能力，从而实现视觉表示能力与推理效率的协同优化。
AI.result: 在4个AIGIQA数据库上的大量实验表明，PKT框架使学生模型在保持与教师模型相当性能的同时，计算成本降低了67.7%。与现有方法相比，该方法在模型效率与评估精度之间取得了更优的平衡。
AI.conclusion: PKT框架通过知识蒸馏有效弥合了复杂模型与高效模型之间的性能差距，为AI生成图像的大规模质量评估提供了一种兼顾精度与效率的可行解决方案，对推动图像生成技术的实际应用具有重要价值。

title: Cross-Contextual Vision-Language Adaptation with LoRA for Personalized Severe Adverse Event Detection in Clinical Wound Monitoring
summary: Wound monitoring is a critical yet underserved clinical challenge, where timely identification of severe adverse events (SAEs) such as infection, tissue deterioration, and delayed healing can significantly impact patient outcomes. While vision-language models (VLMs) show strong multimodal reasoning, they often lack domain-specific grounding to integrate wound imagery with heterogeneous clinical information, and provide limited mechanisms for detecting cases that diverge from the training distribution. We present a multimodal framework for automated wound monitoring and SAE detection. Our approach leverages paired clinical notes and wound descriptions capturing visual characteristics such as appearance, surrounding skin condition, color changes, and signs of inflammation or healing progression, encoded through a dual-stream Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) framework built on a frozen BiomedCLIP backbone. We introduce a cross-contextual LoRA fusion mechanism enabling information exchange between clinical semantics and visual wound descriptors, producing context-aware multimodal representations without full model fine-tuning. To identify personalized SAEs, we propose a wound-specific out-of-distribution (OOD) detection framework combining semantic matching, visual typicality, caption-text alignment, and caption-visual alignment into a unified SAE (OOD) score. To capture healing dynamics, we incorporate covariate consistency and temporal drift penalties that leverage changes in wound characteristics across visits. Experiments on a longitudinal wound dataset collected through clinical visits show promising performance on both wound healing assessment and SAE detection, highlighting the potential of semantically enriched, temporally aware vision-language systems for clinical wound monitoring and early risk identification.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多模态伤口监测框架，结合双流LoRA融合与伤口专用OOD检测，在纵向临床数据集上实现了伤口愈合评估和严重不良事件的有效检测。
AI.motivation: 伤口监测是临床关键但服务不足的领域，现有视觉语言模型缺乏领域特异性，难以将伤口图像与异构临床信息相结合，且无法有效检测与训练分布相偏离的异常病例。
AI.method: 基于冻结的BiomedCLIP骨干，采用双流低秩自适应框架对临床笔记和伤口视觉描述分别编码，并提出跨上下文LoRA融合机制实现临床语义与视觉描述符之间的信息交换。为检测个性化严重不良事件，提出伤口专用OOD检测框架，结合语义匹配、视觉典型性、描述-文本对齐和描述-视觉对齐为统一SAE（OOD）分数，并引入协变量一致性和时间漂移惩罚以捕捉愈合动态。
AI.result: 在通过临床访视收集的纵向伤口数据集上的实验表明，该方法在伤口愈合评估和严重不良事件检测方面均表现出有前景的性能，验证了语义丰富、时间感知的视觉语言系统在临床伤口监测中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了语义丰富且时间感知的多模态视觉语言系统在自动化伤口监测和早期风险识别中的重要价值，为临床伤口管理提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Benchmarking KV-Cache Optimizations across Task Quality and System Performance for Long-Context Serving
summary: Large language model serving is increasingly limited by KV-cache growth under long-context workloads, yet existing KV-cache compression techniques are difficult to compare because they were evaluated on different models, tasks, budgets, and serving stacks. This paper presents a workload-aware benchmark of representative KV-cache optimization mechanisms spanning quantization, pruning, and merging, including KIVI, TurboQuant, SnapKV, and CaM, evaluated on LongBench-style multi-document QA, single-document QA, few-shot learning, and summarization workloads using Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct and Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3. The benchmark measures task quality, mean output throughput, mean time-to-first-token, and realized compression ratio across context-length buckets. The results show that the compression ratio alone is a poor predictor of end-to-end performance. KIVI4 provides the most stable quality across models, SnapKV delivers the strongest long-context throughput, and CaM yields large gains on selected QA workloads but exhibits substantial workload sensitivity in both quality and realized compression ratio. These findings motivate workload-aware selection of KV-cache mechanisms rather than one-size-fits-all compression and provide deployment guidance for long-context serving systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向KV缓存压缩技术的工作负载感知基准评测，系统比较了量化、剪枝和合并三类方法在长上下文场景下的端到端性能，发现压缩比无法反映实际系统性能，并揭示了不同技术在不同工作负载下的显著性能差异。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在长上下文推理时KV缓存持续增长已成为服务瓶颈，但现有KV缓存压缩技术（如量化、剪枝、合并）因评估使用的模型、任务、压缩预算和服务栈各不相同，导致难以进行公平和系统性的横向比较，缺乏实际部署场景下的统一基准。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个工作负载感知的基准框架，选取了代表三类KV缓存优化机制的方法——量化（KIVI, TurboQuant）、剪枝（SnapKV）和合并（CaM），在LongBench风格的多文档问答、单文档问答、少样本学习和摘要四种工作负载上，使用Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct和Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3两个模型进行评测，测量任务质量、平均输出吞吐量、平均首Token延迟和实际压缩比等指标，并按上下文长度分桶分析。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，压缩比本身并不能有效预测端到端系统性能。具体而言，KIVI4在所有模型中提供了最稳定的质量表现；SnapKV在长上下文场景下实现了最强的吞吐量；CaM在部分问答任务上取得了显著增益，但其质量和实际压缩比均表现出较大的工作负载敏感性。
AI.conclusion: KV缓存压缩机制的选择应基于工作负载特性而非追求单一的压缩比，不存在放之四海皆准的最优方法。本文的发现为长上下文服务系统的部署提供了具体指导，即需要根据实际负载特征进行工作负载感知的KV缓存机制选型。

title: Prompt-to-Paper: Agentic AI System for Bioinformatics
summary: While recent advances in large language models have enabled end-to-end automated manuscript generation, existing systems suffer from three critical deficiencies: (i) generated claims are not deterministically grounded in verifiable literature, (ii) experimental results are frequently fabricated rather than executed, and (iii) there exists no standardized, multi-dimensional framework to assess whether AI-generated manuscripts meet the quality and rigor required for real-world publication. We present Prompt-to-Paper, a multi-agent framework that directly addresses this evaluation gap through three integrated innovations. First, a deterministic retrieval-augmented generation pipeline with section-aware relevance scoring and snowball citation expansion grounds every claim in a verifiable corpus of 60--100 papers. Second, an autonomous coding agent executes real computational biology experiments replacing synthetic outputs with genuine numerical results. Third, an eight-dimensional automated quality scorer, benchmarked with approximate reference statistics from published papers and augmented with explicit hallucination penalties, provides standardized, reproducible quality assessments. The quality-driven improvement loop uses a context-rich reviser that routes each iteration to one of three researcher actions and fires a deep research cycle every ten iterations to re-run experiments and re-manuscript from stronger outputs. We validate the system on five bioinformatics case studies; all five cases compiled submission-formatted PDFs with zero out-of-range citations. The improvement loop raises manuscript quality by an average of +17.96 points on a 0--100 scale (maximum +26.04. As partial external checks, a human reviewer scored the five manuscripts at an average of 7.0 out of 10. Complete manuscripts are produced at approximately 0.31 USD per paper.

AI.tldr: Prompt-to-Paper 是一个多智能体框架，通过确定性检索增强生成、自主代码执行实验和八维自动化质量评分器，解决了现有AI论文生成系统在文献可验证性、实验真实性和质量评估标准化三方面的关键缺陷，在五个生物信息学案例中以每篇约0.31美元的成本生成了达到人类评审7.0/10分水平的投稿格式PDF。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型驱动的端到端论文生成系统存在三个关键缺陷：生成的声明无法确定性地锚定于可验证文献、实验结果经常是被编造而非真实执行的、以及缺乏标准化的多维度框架来评估AI生成稿件是否达到真实出版所需的质量和严谨性。
AI.method: 提出Prompt-to-Paper多智能体框架，包含三项核心创新：一是确定性检索增强生成管道，通过章节感知相关性评分和雪球式引文扩展将每个声明锚定在60-100篇可验证文献的语料库中；二是自主代码执行智能体，在真实计算生物学实验中执行代码并替换合成输出为真实数值结果；三是八维自动化质量评分器，以已发表论文的近似参考统计量作为基准并引入显式幻觉惩罚，提供标准化可重复的质量评估。此外，质量驱动的改进循环使用上下文丰富的修订器，每次迭代路由至三种研究者操作之一，每十次迭代触发一次深度研究循环以重新运行实验并基于更强输出重写稿件。
AI.result: 在五个生物信息学案例研究上验证系统，所有五个案例均生成了投稿格式PDF且零超出范围的引用。改进循环将稿件质量平均提升了+17.96分（满分100分），最高提升+26.04分。作为部分外部校验，人类评审者对五篇稿件的平均评分为7.0/10分。完整稿件的生成成本约为每篇0.31美元。
AI.conclusion: Prompt-to-Paper 框架通过确定性文献锚定、真实实验执行和自动化质量评估的三重机制，有效解决了AI论文生成中的可验证性和质量标准缺失问题，以极低的成本生成了达到接近人类可接受水平的完整学术稿件，为自动化科学写作提供了一条可审计、可复现的技术路径。

title: REVIVE: A Multi-Modal Framework for Vandalism Detection and Recovery in Autonomous Vehicles
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) face increasing threats from vandalism-induced occlusion attacks (VOAs) that compromise camera-based perception. While detection frameworks can identify vandalized images, restoring camera-stream utility after physical occlusion remains underexplored. This paper presents present the Recovery and Enhancement of Vandalized Images for Vision Excellence (REVIVE) framework, a vandalism recovery pipeline integrating: (1) binary VOA detection, (2) multi-class VOA pattern identification, (3) EfficientNet-based U-Net segmentation, and (4) type-aware recovery using Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training (BLIP)-guided Stable Diffusion inpainting, direct pixel replacement, or adaptive median filtering. Stable Diffusion shows variable reconstruction performance (per-pattern SSIM 0.667-0.867, PSNR 15.4-26.7dB) across VOA patterns, while aligned direct pixel replacement achieves near-identical reconstruction under the aligned-reference condition. On 500 tracked clean/vandalized image pairs, unrecovered VOAs reduce YOLOv8l object-detection recall to 0.588, while direct pixel replacement restores recall to 0.967 and F1-score to 0.970 under that aligned-reference condition. LaMa, Telea, and Navier-Stokes baselines improve image similarity but provide more limited downstream detection recovery, and Stable Diffusion is treated as an asynchronous recovery branch subject to a quality gate rather than a blocking real-time perception step. We evaluate a reference-available quality gate that filters recovered candidates before downstream use: without it, type-aware routing degrades per-image recall to 0.304, whereas with it, recall returns to 0.608, at or above the unrecovered baseline, ensuring the forwarded stream is never worse than the unrecovered frame. REVIVE therefore, provides a structured recovery framework from VOAs in AVs.

AI.tldr: REVIVE 提出面向自动驾驶车辆涂鸦遮挡攻击（VOA）的结构化恢复框架，集成检测、分割与类型感知修复，在参考对齐条件下将YOLOv8l召回率从0.588恢复至0.967，并通过质量门控确保恢复后性能不低于未恢复基线。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆面临涂鸦遮挡攻击（VOA）对摄像头感知的威胁，现有检测框架可识别受损图像，但物理遮挡后的摄像头数据流恢复问题尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: REVIVE 框架包含四个阶段：二元VOA检测、多类VOA模式识别、EfficientNet主干U-Net分割，以及类型感知恢复。恢复模块采用三路策略：BLIP引导的Stable Diffusion修复、直接像素替换（对齐参考条件）和自适应中值滤波，并引入质量门控机制筛选恢复候选项后再送入下游任务。
AI.result: Stable Diffusion在不同VOA模式上表现波动（SSIM 0.667–0.867，PSNR 15.4–26.7dB）；直接像素替换在对齐参考条件下实现近乎完美重建。未恢复VOA下YOLOv8l召回率为0.588，直接像素替换将其恢复至0.967召回率和0.970 F1分数。无质量门控时类型感知路由将单帧召回率降至0.304；引入质量门控后恢复至0.608，达到或超过未恢复基线。
AI.conclusion: REVIVE 为自动驾驶车辆VOA攻击提供了一种结构化的恢复框架，其质量门控机制保障恢复后数据流不劣于原始受损帧，同时将计算开销大的Stable Diffusion作为异步非阻塞分支处理，兼顾了实时性与恢复质量。

title: The yes-no bias of large language models reflects answer order and wording, not shifts in moral judgment
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly issue judgments read as binary verdicts, and a growing literature reports such judgments shifting under logically irrelevant changes of wording - among them an amplified yes-no bias on moral dilemmas, absent in humans. A single framing cannot say what such a shift is: in a yes/no question the word "no" is at once logical verdict, lexical token, and last-printed option. We introduce a psychometric battery that separates these: crossed symmetrization - every logically irrelevant factor flipped in balanced pairs - across a corpus of question forms. A graded rating across logically equivalent forms recovers a coherent internal moral scale: frontier models' stance $θ$ is nearly format-invariant (cross-form incoherence 0.12-0.21 on a $\pm 1$ axis); small open-weight models fail in model-specific ways. Forcing the verdict through yes/no overlays a decomposable artifact: an order bias toward the last-printed option - opposite to classic human primacy - plus a lexical pull toward the word "no"; the artifact is substantial only in the Claude models (story-averaged -0.32 to -0.86), $\approx 0$ for GPT-5.5 and Gemini, and shrinks under extended reasoning. The word and the verdict share one token; swapping the words for arbitrary labels separates them, and the verdict-attached logical bias proves $\approx 0$ for every frontier model, while model-specific label and order attachments remain: the models are not drawn toward rejecting - the pull follows the printed surface, not the verdict it carries. A minimal model, $P = σ((θ\pm m)/s)$, summarizes any such artifact by a framing susceptibility m and a moral decisiveness s, measurably distinct from sampling temperature. The battery applies unchanged to any dilemma set and binary format: measuring what a model values requires crossing the frames of the question, not asking once.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种心理测量学测试方法（交叉对称化），用于分离大型语言模型在二元道德判断中由词序、词义和选项位置引起的伪影，发现前沿模型存在稳定的内在道德尺度，而二元强迫回答引入的可分解伪影主要源于对最后印刷选项的偏向和对“no”词汇的吸引，而非对否决判决的逻辑偏好。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明LLM的道德判断会因措辞的无关变化而发生偏移，但二元提问（是非题）中的“no”同时承载逻辑判决、词汇标记和最后选项三重角色，单一框架无法区分这些因素的影响，因此亟需一种能够分离这些混淆因素的系统性方法。
AI.method: 提出“交叉对称化”心理测量学测试方法：在问题形式语料库中，对每一个逻辑无关的因素以平衡配对方式交叉翻转，并通过在逻辑等价的多种形式上进行分级评分来恢复模型的内在道德尺度，同时引入一个最小模型 P = σ((θ±m)/s) 来量化框架敏感性 m 和道德决断性 s。
AI.result: 前沿模型的道德立场θ几乎不受提问格式影响（交叉形式不一致性仅为0.12–0.21）；二元强制回答叠加的可分解伪影表现为对最后印刷选项的顺序偏向（与人类的首位偏向相反）和对“no”词汇的词汇吸引，该伪影在Claude模型中显著（故事平均-0.32至-0.86），在GPT-5.5和Gemini中接近0，且随扩展推理而缩小；将“yes/no”替换为任意标签可分离词汇与判决，发现所有前沿模型对否决判决的逻辑偏向≈0。
AI.conclusion: 模型并非倾向于否决本身，而是被印刷表面的词汇和位置所吸引；测量模型的价值判断必须交叉变换问题的框架而非仅提问一次，所提方法可通用适用于任何困境集和二元格式。

title: CSTutorBench: Benchmarking Small Language Models as Tutors for Block-Based Programming
summary: Large language models are increasingly explored as AI tutors, yet deploying them in K-12 settings raises concerns around privacy, cost, and reliance on proprietary models. Small language models (SLMs) offer a promising alternative, but selecting the right model for a specific educational context remains difficult, particularly when the target domain, such as block-based programming, is largely absent from model training data. We introduce CSTutorBench, a benchmark for evaluating language models as CS tutors in VEX VR, a block-based robotics environment. The benchmark comprises 17 scenario-based questions scored against a pedagogical rubric grounded in established tutoring and feedback research, with a human-in-the-loop LLM-as-judge pipeline for evaluation. Preliminary findings across 11 models (4B-120B parameters) reveal that models perform well on surface-level criteria such as vocabulary and tone but struggle with deeper pedagogical behaviors, particularly avoiding answer leakage and engaging with student debugging histories. In our sample, model family and instruction-tuning approach appear to be better predictors of tutoring quality than parameter count alone, though the small number of models limits the strength of this conclusion. A targeted prompt revision grounded in recent educational prompt engineering research improved scores for 10 of 11 models. These results underscore the value of context-specific, pedagogically grounded benchmarks for SLM selection in educational deployment.

AI.tldr: CSTutorBench是一个针对VEX VR块编程环境的AI导学能力评测基准，包含17个基于教学法的场景题与LLM-as-judge评估管线。初步实验显示，小语言模型在表层标准上表现良好，但在深层教学行为上仍有不足，且模型家族与指令微调方式比参数量更能预测辅导质量。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在教育场景尤其是K-12中部署面临隐私、成本和依赖专有模型等问题，小语言模型（SLM）是潜在替代方案；但在特定教育领域（如块编程）中，由于目标领域数据几乎未被包含在模型训练集中，如何为具体教学场景选择合适模型仍缺乏系统评估工具与基准。
AI.method: 提出CSTutorBench基准，包含17个面向VEX VR块编程环境的情境问题，评分基于一个融合经典导学与反馈研究文献的教学法评分标准；评估采用人机协同的LLM-as-judge流程，对11个参数范围为4B至120B的模型进行测试，并基于教育提示工程研究对提示进行针对性修订以衡量改进效果。
AI.result: 模型在词汇、语气等表层标准上表现良好，但在深层教学行为（尤其是避免答案泄漏和利用学生调试历史）上表现欠佳；模型家族与指令微调方式比参数量更能预测辅导质量，但由于模型数量有限该结论强度受限；针对性的提示修订使11个模型中有10个的评分得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，在SLM教育部署中，基于教学法且面向具体情境的基准对于模型选择具有重要价值；提示工程可在一定程度上改善模型的教学表现，但模型在深层教学行为上的不足表明仍需要更具针对性的训练或微调策略。

title: Clustered Codebook Quantization for 2D Gaussian-based Image Compression
comment: 3 pages. Accepted to ACM SIGGRAPH 2026 Poster Track. Code available at https://github.com/complight/Cluster_Guided_Vector_Quantization
summary: Gaussian-based image representations effectively model image content using compact parametric primitives while preserving high visual fidelity, yet storing a large number of floating-point parameters per primitive degrades rate-distortion efficiency at higher fidelity targets. To improve the rate-distortion performance in Gaussian representation, we present our Cluster-Guided Vector Quantization (CGVQ), a Gaussian primitive based image compression method. Our key idea is to partition Gaussian parameters further into homogeneous groups prior to quantization, enabling higher compression efficiency and accurate parameter reconstruction. In practice, our extensive experiments show that CGVQ decreases the bpp by 20% with respect to our baseline, while maintaining on-par visual quality

AI.tldr: 提出Cluster-Guided Vector Quantization (CGVQ)，通过对高斯基元参数进行聚类分组量化，在保持视觉质量的同时将bpp降低20%。
AI.motivation: 基于高斯表示的图像方法使用紧凑参数基元可保持高视觉保真度，但每个基元存储大量浮点参数在高保真目标下会降低率失真效率，亟需改善高斯表示的率失真性能。
AI.method: 提出Cluster-Guided Vector Quantization (CGVQ)，其核心思想是在量化前将高斯参数进一步划分为同质子组，通过对参数分组实现更高压缩效率和更精确的参数重建。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，CGVQ在保持与基线相当的视觉质量的同时，将bpp降低了20%。
AI.conclusion: 对高斯参数进行聚类引导的向量量化能够有效提升高斯图像表示的率失真性能，在压缩率和重建质量之间取得更优平衡。

title: SpanUQ: Span-Level Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Model Generation
comment: The project page is available at https://damon-demon.github.io/SpanUQ.html
summary: Uncertainty estimation is essential not only for the trustworthy deployment of large language models (LLMs) but also as a foundation for self-refinement in LLM generation. However, existing approaches operate at suboptimal granularities: token-level scores lack semantic coherence, while sequence-level scores fail to localize errors. We formalize Span-Level Uncertainty Estimation (SLUE), a new task that targets the natural granularity for uncertainty: semantically coherent text spans, each conveying a single assessable unit of meaning. To address this task, we introduce SPANUQ, a lightweight probe that distills the uncertainty knowledge from expensive multi-sample inference into a single forward pass over LLM hidden states. SPANUQ employs a DETR-style span decoder to simultaneously detect spans and estimate their uncertainty via a Mixture of Beta distribution, trained with a principled combination of Beta NLL regression and contrastive ranking objectives. We construct SPANUQ-BENCH, the first span-level uncertainty benchmark comprising 20K prompts, 293K annotated spans, and continuous soft labels derived from multi-sample claim verification. Experiments on five LLM backbones show that SPANUQ consistently achieves the best span-level uncertainty quality, outperforming the strongest probe baseline and all sampling-based methods while being 10-20x faster. Its DETR-based span detector attains 0.910 F1, surpassing the best heuristic by 39.4%, enabling precise error localization that sequence-level methods cannot provide. The framework generalizes across five LLMs spanning two model families.

AI.tldr: 提出跨度级不确定性估计任务（SLUE）及轻量级探针模型SPANUQ，通过DETR风格的跨度解码器与Beta混合分布，从单次前向传播中同时检测语义跨度并估计其不确定性，在实现10-20倍加速的同时显著优于现有采样基线和探针方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型不确定性估计方法在粒度上存在不足：token级分数缺乏语义连贯性，而序列级分数无法定位错误。本文试图在语义连贯的文本跨度这一自然粒度上形式化不确定性估计任务，并解决其高效实现问题。
AI.method: 形式化定义跨度级不确定性估计任务（SLUE），并提出SPANUQ——一种轻量级探针模型，从多采样推理中蒸馏不确定性知识并实现单次前向传播推断。SPANUQ采用DETR风格的跨度解码器同时检测跨度和估计不确定性，使用Beta混合分布建模不确定度，通过Beta NLL回归与对比排序目标的组合损失进行训练。同时构建了首个跨度级不确定性基准SPANUQ-BENCH，包含20K提示、293K标注跨度和基于多采样声明验证的连续软标签。
AI.result: 在五个不同LLM骨干上的实验表明，SPANUQ在跨度级不确定性估计质量上持续最优，超越最强探针基线和所有基于采样的方法，同时速度提升10-20倍。其DETR跨度检测器达到0.910 F1，比最佳启发式方法高出39.4%，实现了序列级方法无法提供的精确错误定位能力。该方法在涵盖两个模型家族的五个LLM上具有良好的泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了跨度级不确定性估计是兼顾语义连贯性与错误定位精度的有效粒度，且通过知识蒸馏和DETR式解码可以实现高效单次推断。SPANUQ为LLM的可信部署和自精炼提供了实用且高效的解决方案，也开启了跨度级不确定性估计这一新研究方向。

title: Foundation Models for Automatic CAD Generation
comment: Accepted as a book chapter in "Advances in Global Applied Artificial Intelligence" (G. A. Tsihrintzis, M. Virvou, N. G. Bourbakis, L. C. Jain, Eds.), authenticated version will be published in Springer series: Learning and Analytics in Intelligent Systems
summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) enable the automatic generation of parametric 3D designs from natural-language specifications. This chapter presents an empirical study of foundation models for automatic Computer-Aided Design (CAD) generation of mechanical parts, using a unified evaluation pipeline and a curated benchmark of 97 engineering design problems. We introduce LLMForge, a multi-model text-to-CAD framework integrating JSON-schema validation, analytic feature scoring, mesh synthesis, and multi-round iterative refinement, studied under two critique regimes. IterTracer uses a Phong-shaded ray-trace renderer with analytic visual metrics (silhouette IoU, hole visibility, edge clearance, aspect-ratio conformance) for lightweight geometry-aware feedback across rounds. IterVision replaces the analytic scorer with a VLM semantic critic (Qwen2.5-VL-72B) that evaluates rendered views via chain-of-thought visual reasoning, assessing spatial coherence and design intent. On a benchmark spanning four canonical geometry families (plates with holes and bolt circles, multi-feature boxes, flanged cylinders, and L-brackets), we evaluate seven foundation models: DeepSeek-V3.2, Qwen3-235B-A22B, Llama-3.3-70B, Gemma-3-27B, GLM-4.5, MiniMax-M2.1, and INTELLECT. Under IterTracer, the four highest-ranked models form a tight cluster (overall mean in [0.885, 0.890]) with 98.97% mesh success, showing that compact instruction-tuned models can match substantially larger systems. VLM-based critique in IterVision yields 100% watertight mesh generation on the leading model while surfacing systematic difficulty on rotationally symmetric geometries such as cylinders, where visual and semantic scoring diverge most. We discuss benchmark design, failure modes, CAD-oriented prompting, and implications for industrial workflows and scalable automated mechanical design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLMForge，一个多模型文本到CAD的自动生成框架，集成JSON-schema验证、特征评分、网格合成与多轮迭代优化，并在97个工程设计问题基准上对7种基础模型进行实证评估。IterTracer（基于光线追踪的可视化分析）和IterVision（基于VLM的语义评判）两种批评机制均取得高网格生成成功率，其中紧凑指令微调模型在性能上可与更大规模系统媲美。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型与视觉语言模型虽能实现从自然语言到参数化3D设计的自动生成，但缺乏针对机械零件CAD生成的系统性实证研究，特别是在多模型统一评估、抗旋转对称几何体的视觉-语义评分一致性以及工业级可扩展性方面存在空白。
AI.method: 提出LLMForge多模型文本到CAD框架，包含JSON-schema验证、解析特征评分、网格合成与多轮迭代优化四个模块；设计两种批评机制：IterTracer基于Phong着色光线追踪渲染器，利用轮廓IoU、孔洞可见性、边缘间距及纵横比等解析视觉指标进行轻量级几何感知反馈，IterVision则用Qwen2.5-VL-72B作为VLM语义评判器，通过链式思维视觉推理评估空间一致性与设计意图。
AI.result: 在覆盖板材孔洞及螺栓圆、多特征箱体、法兰圆柱和L型支架四类几何族的97问题基准上评估了DeepSeek-V3.2、Qwen3-235B-A22B等7种模型；IterTracer下排名前四的模型总体均值在[0.885,0.890]紧密区间，网格成功率达98.97%；IterVision下领先模型实现100%水密网格生成，但在圆柱等旋转对称几何体上视觉与语义评分分歧最大。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑指令微调模型在CAD生成任务中可与大幅面模型竞争，展现成本效益优势；VLM语义批评虽能提升水密性，但对旋转对称几何的视觉-语义不一致性暴露了当前方法的固有限制；研究结果对基准设计、失效模式分析、CAD提示工程及工业自动化机械设计工作流具有参考意义。

title: Robust Face Super-Resolution and Recognition Through Multi-Feature Aggregation in Diffusion Models
summary: Images acquired in surveillance environments often suffer from conditions such as low resolution, variations in pose, irregular illumination, and occlusions. Due to the low quality of these images, face recognition algorithms often struggle. This major limitation can be addressed by employing super-resolution techniques that enhance the details of the image. However, due to the high degree of difficulty of the problem, most super-resolution algorithms tend to cause distortions in the image and in the individual's identity. Thus, additional information must be incorporated into the processing to improve recognition robustness. In this regard, surveillance cameras can capture multiple images, even at low quality, and the data extracted from these images, such as consecutive video frames, can significantly enhance both super-resolution and facial recognition. In this work, we introduce FASR++, a diffusion-model-based super-resolution algorithm. It leverages a reference low-resolution image and features extracted from multiple auxiliary low-quality images to generate a super-resolved output, minimizing distortions in the individual's identity. Our approach recovers facial features without explicitly providing soft attributes or computing a function gradient to guide the reconstruction process. FASR++ generates high-quality images that can considerably improve performance in face recognition tasks when used as a pre-processing step. We validate our approach on two standard face recognition datasets and attain state-of-the-art results for verification, face recognition, and image quality metrics such as PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FASR++，一种基于扩散模型的超分辨率算法，通过融合多个低质量辅助图像的特征来重建高质量人脸图像，在降低身份失真的同时显著提升监控场景下的人脸识别性能，在标准数据集上取得了验证、识别及图像质量指标上的最先进结果。
AI.motivation: 监控环境采集的图像常存在低分辨率、姿态变化、光照不均和遮挡等问题，导致传统人脸识别算法性能严重下降。现有超分辨率方法虽能增强图像细节，但由于问题难度高，容易产生图像失真和身份信息丢失，无法有效改善识别鲁棒性，亟需引入额外的多帧信息来同时提升超分辨率和人脸识别效果。
AI.method: FASR++是一种基于扩散模型的超分辨率算法，其输入包括一张低分辨率参考图像和从多张辅助低质量图像（如连续视频帧）中提取的特征，模型通过扩散过程生成超分辨率输出，无需显式提供软属性或计算函数梯度来引导重建，即可恢复人脸特征并最小化身份失真。
AI.result: 在标准人脸识别数据集上的实验表明，FASR++在图像质量指标（PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS）以及验证和人脸识别任务上均取得了最先进的结果，证明其生成的高质量图像作为预处理步骤能显著提升人脸识别性能。
AI.conclusion: FASR++证明了利用多帧低质量辅助图像结合扩散模型进行超分辨率重建，可以在不依赖额外属性标注或梯度引导的情况下有效恢复人脸身份特征，为监控场景下的人脸识别提供了一种鲁棒的预处理方案，具有重要的实际应用价值。

title: Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion: A Tri-Mode Language Model Unifying Autoregressive, Diffusion, and Self-Speculation Decoding
summary: We introduce Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion, a tri-mode language model (LM) that unifies AR, diffusion, and self-speculation decoding within a single architecture. Trained with a joint AR-diffusion objective, Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion can switch modes to sustain high throughput across deployment settings and concurrency levels. Our study shows that (1) AR and diffusion objectives are complementary: diffusion improves lookahead planning, while AR provides left-to-right linguistic priors. (2) In self-speculation mode, diffusion drafts while AR verifies, outperforming multi-token prediction (MTP) methods in both acceptance rate and real-device efficiency. (3) A speed-of-light analysis further demonstrates diffusion's long-term potential, with up to 76.5% more tokens per forward pass than self-speculation under an optimal sampler. Scaling to 3B, 8B, and 14B parameters, our Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion family, including base, instruct, and vision-language models, consistently outperforms state-of-the-art open-source AR and diffusion LMs in both accuracy and speed. For example, Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-8B decodes 6x more tokens per forward than Qwen3-8B with comparable accuracy, translating to 4x higher throughput on SPEED-Bench with SGLang on a GB200 GPU.

AI.tldr: 提出Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion，一种统一自回归（AR）、扩散和自我推测解码的三模态语言模型，通过联合训练实现模式切换，在精度和速度上均超越现有开源AR和扩散语言模型。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型通常采用单一的自回归（AR）或扩散生成范式，AR难以进行全局前瞻规划，而扩散模型缺乏从左到右的语言先验，且两者在部署时无法根据并发度和吞吐需求灵活切换生成模式，缺乏统一的架构同时兼顾生成质量与推理效率。
AI.method: 提出Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion，采用统一的Transformer架构，通过联合AR-扩散目标进行训练，使模型可在AR模式、扩散模式和自推测解码模式之间灵活切换；在自推测模式下，扩散模型作为草稿生成器，AR模型作为验证器，实现高效推理。
AI.result: 实验表明AR和扩散目标互补，自推测模式在接受率和设备效率上优于多token预测方法；速度分析显示扩散在最优采样器下每次前向传播可比自推测多生成76.5%的token；在3B、8B和14B尺度上，Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion在准确率和速度上均优于当前最先进的开源AR和扩散LM，其中8B模型每次前向传播比Qwen3-8B多解码6倍token，在GB200上使用SGLang时吞吐量提升4倍。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明AR和扩散目标具有互补性，统一架构可兼顾生成质量与推理效率，扩散模型在高效采样方面具有长期潜力，为构建高性能、高吞吐的语言模型提供了新的设计范式。

title: FirstResearch: Auditable Question Formation for LLM Scientific Discovery Agents
summary: LLM systems for scientific discovery increasingly assist with ideation, literature synthesis, experiment planning, and report generation, but the first research question they propose can remain difficult to audit: it may sound plausible without exposing the mechanism, falsifier, or assumption that a scientist should inspect. We introduce FirstResearch, a first-principles research-question formation framework for scientific LLM agents whose core artifact is a structured Research Question Certificate. The certificate records primitive definitions, assumptions, a mechanism model, a tension or contradiction, a falsifiable hypothesis, a minimal decisive test, and a failure update rule, making the proposed question inspectable before downstream execution. On ten LLM-agent research topics, FirstResearch outperforms controlled prompt-level baselines inspired by AI co-scientist, Agent Laboratory, and AI Scientist-v2 under a primary DeepSeek-blind-judge protocol. A Gemini-2.5-Flash independent-judge rescore of the same 40 baseline packages preserves the system-level ranking, with FirstResearch scoring 4.86/5 versus 4.38/5 for the strongest baseline and Pearson agreement of 0.865 on average score. A one-repeat ablation checkpoint further suggests that the certificate-centered core is the strongest component: certificate-only scoring reaches 4.90/5 under DeepSeek and 4.88/5 under Gemini, while removing certificates drops below 1/5 under both judges. These results are preliminary and use LLM judges rather than human domain experts, but they support a narrow scientific-discovery claim: explicit derivation constraints are a promising mechanism for making LLM-generated scientific questions more auditable. Code, prompts, saved outputs, and reproduction scripts are available at https://github.com/louiswang524/FirstResearch.

AI.tldr: FirstResearch 提出了一种基于第一性原理的结构化研究问题生成框架，通过输出可审计的研究问题证书（包含定义、假设、机制模型、矛盾点、可证伪假设和关键实验等），使 LLM 智能体提出的科研问题变得可审查、可验证，在多项基准上优于现有 AI 科学家系统。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 科学发现系统（如 AI co-scientist、Agent Laboratory、AI Scientist-v2）虽然能够辅助提出研究问题，但这些问题往往难以审计：它们听起来合理，却未能暴露其背后的机制、可证伪条件或隐含假设，科学家无法在深入执行前对其进行检查。
AI.method: FirstResearch 提出了一种基于第一性原理（first-principles）的研究问题生成框架，其核心产出是一个结构化的 Research Question Certificate（研究问题证书），该证书包含原始定义、假设、机制模型、矛盾/张力、可证伪假设、最小决定性实验以及失败更新规则共七个要素，使问题在下游执行前即可被审查。
AI.result: 在十个 LLM 智能体研究主题上，FirstResearch 在 DeepSeek 盲审协议下优于基于 AI co-scientist、Agent Laboratory 和 AI Scientist-v2 的提示词级别基线；Gemini-2.5-Flash 独立重审同样 40 个基线包保持系统级排名，FirstResearch 得分 4.86/5 而最强基线为 4.38/5，平均分 Pearson 一致性达 0.865。消融实验表明证书核心是最强组件：仅证书模块得分 4.90/5（DeepSeek）和 4.88/5（Gemini），而去除证书后得分降至 1/5 以下。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，显式的推演约束（explicit derivation constraints）是提升 LLM 生成科研问题可审计性的有效机制；尽管结果属于初步性质且仅使用 LLM 而非人类专家评判，但该框架有力地支持了一个窄化科学发现主张：通过结构化证书约束可使 AI 提出的研究问题更具可审查性和可信度。

title: SAMPLe: SAM-based Optimizer for Prompt Learning in VLMs
comment: The manuscript has been accepted to ECCV and will be presented at the conference and published in the main proceedings
summary: Pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) like CLIP have proven highly effective as foundation models for various downstream applications. However, prompt learning in VLMs encounters a performance-generalization dilemma: while prompts can be tuned to achieve high accuracy on seen distributions, this tuning process often undermines their generalizability to unseen data. The limited set of learnable prompts, which contextualize and condition the input to steer it toward the task within the pretrained VLM, tends to overfit the training data, leading to a trade-off between task-specific performance and preserving generalization. To address this dilemma, we introduce SAMPLe (Sharpness-Aware Minimization Prompt Learning), a plug-in sharpness-aware optimizer that enhances prompt generalizability by accounting for loss landscape sharpness. Unlike conventional methods, SAMPLe balances exploration and exploitation by satisfying objective function constraints at each step, dynamically adapting to the current optimization state based on the local curvature and gradient properties. This approach reduces overfitting on seen distributions and improves adaptability to unseen data, preserving the generalization potential of pre-trained VLM models. We integrate SAMPLe into multiple prompt learning frameworks, including CoOp, CoCoOp, MaPLe, TCP, and Co-Prompt, demonstrating its effectiveness across diverse methods. Experiments show that SAMPLe elevates prompt learning frameworks and consistently outperforms existing optimizers across diverse settings, establishing itself as a robust, model-agnostic solution for prompt learning.

AI.tldr: SAMPLe 是一种即插即用的锐度感知优化器，通过约束损失景观的锐度来增强提示学习泛化能力，在多个提示学习框架中一致优于现有优化器，解决了 VLM 提示学习中性能与泛化之间的权衡困境。
AI.motivation: 预训练视觉语言模型（如 CLIP）中提示学习面临性能与泛化的权衡困境：可学习的提示在训练分布上可获得高精度，但极易过拟合训练数据，损害对未见数据的泛化能力，现有方法未能有效缓解这一根本矛盾。
AI.method: SAMPLe 提出一种锐度感知最小化优化器，在每一步优化中通过考虑局部曲率和梯度属性动态满足目标函数约束，平衡探索与利用，从而降低损失景观的锐度并抑制对可见分布的过拟合。该方法可作为即插即用模块集成到 CoOp、CoCoOp、MaPLe、TCP 和 Co-Prompt 等多种提示学习框架中。
AI.result: 实验表明，SAMPLe 在多种提示学习框架和不同设置下一致优于现有优化器，显著提升了模型在未见数据上的泛化能力，验证了其作为模型无关的鲁棒优化方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SAMPLe 通过动态感知损失景观曲率的优化策略，在不改变模型架构的前提下有效保留了预训练 VLM 的泛化潜力，为提示学习提供了一种通用且鲁棒的优化范式，具有良好的可迁移性和实用价值。

title: Is Domain Adaptation Always Helpful? A Frozen-Backbone Study of Cross-Domain Sentiment Transfer
summary: Sentiment analysis with frozen pre-trained language model (PLM) backbones has become a common paradigm, yet the practical benefit of explicit domain adaptation remains unclear, particularly when backbones encode varying degrees of target-domain knowledge. We present a preliminary case study evaluating a controlled family of frozen embedding backbones (Qwen3-Embedding 0.6B, 4B, 8B), alongside RoBERTa-base and FinBERT. We train a lightweight MLP adapter on consumer reviews using Domain-Adversarial Neural Networks (DANN), Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD), and Supervised Contrastive Learning (SCL), and evaluate transfer to movie reviews (SST-2) and a heavily restricted subset of financial news (Financial PhraseBank). Within this constrained sample, we observe two distinct transfer patterns. On SST-2, domain adaptation provides negligible gain regardless of scale. On the financial subset, explicit domain adaptation appears to recover substantial performance for small general-purpose backbones. Notably, we find that adversarial alignment (DANN) is associated with degraded performance for domain-specialized backbones like FinBERT, consistent with erosion of pre-existing domain-specific structure, whereas supervised contrastive loss appears to preserve it. These preliminary findings suggest that the efficacy of explicit domain adaptation is highly contingent on whether the frozen backbone already possesses target-domain coverage.

AI.tldr: 本案例研究表明，在冻结预训练语言模型进行情感分析时，显式域适应的有效性高度依赖于骨干网络是否已包含目标域知识：对于小规模通用骨干网络，域适应能显著恢复性能，但对已具备领域知识的专用骨干网络（如FinBERT）可能带来负面效果。
AI.motivation: 在冻结预训练语言模型（PLM）进行情感分析已成为常见范式的背景下，显式域适应是否真正带来实际收益仍不明确，尤其是当不同骨干网络已编码不同程度的目标域知识时，现有研究缺乏对此问题的系统性对比与分析。
AI.method: 本研究以可控的冻结嵌入骨干网络系列（Qwen3-Embedding 0.6B、4B、8B）以及RoBERTa-base和FinBERT为实验对象，在消费者评论数据上训练轻量级MLP适配器，分别采用域对抗神经网络（DANN）、最大均值差异（MMD）和监督对比学习（SCL）三种域适应方法，并评估其在电影评论（SST-2）和受限金融新闻子集（Financial PhraseBank）上的迁移效果。
AI.result: 实验观察到两种不同的迁移模式：在SST-2上，域适应几乎不带来任何增益；在金融子集上，显式域适应能显著恢复小规模通用骨干网络的性能。值得注意的是，对抗性对齐（DANN）在领域专用骨干网络FinBERT上导致性能下降，而监督对比损失则能较好地保留其原有的领域特定结构。
AI.conclusion: 显式域适应的有效性高度依赖于冻结骨干网络是否已具备目标域覆盖能力——当骨干网络已编码目标域知识时，域适应可能侵蚀其原有结构并带来负面影响；反之，对于缺乏目标域知识的小规模通用骨干，域适应则能显著提升性能。这一发现提示未来研究在选择域适应策略时需考虑骨干网络的领域先验知识。

title: Memory in the Loop: In-Process Retrieval as ExtendedWorking Memory for Language Agents
summary: Language agents run a loop - observe, reason, act - but the memory they reason over sits outside it: a store queried at most once per turn. We study the regime where memory moves inside the loop, read and written on every step. The obstacle has always been latency: networked stores answer in tens to hundreds of milliseconds, and in-loop retrieval can inflate end-to-end latency by up to 83x when retrieval is expensive. Prior work manages that cost rather than questioning it: serving-layer scheduling hides it, "memory-first" designs ration retrieval to once per turn. We argue latency is a property of where the store lives, not the in-loop pattern: an in-process store answers in ~100us, three orders of magnitude below the network regime, and at that speed the per-step tax collapses. By the extended-mind thesis's parity principle, a store fast enough to be constantly and directly available becomes extended working memory, not a tool the agent merely consults. The premise is causal: holding a fixed per-turn memory-latency budget and varying only the store's answer speed, redundant actions rise monotonically with latency - 0.0 of 12 at in-process speed, 7.2 of 12 at a 110ms cloud round trip (gpt-5-nano, gpt-5-mini; exact permutation p=0.0079). We demonstrate the regime end-to-end: across four GPT-5-class models under a bounded window, recall improves from 0/5 to 3.6-4.8/5 with in-loop memory, store ops at p50 80-165us - though an instructed restate-every-reply baseline also solves it perfectly, at a token cost that grows with the working set. The store never lost a fact in any run (244 of 244 writes kept); every miss traces to the agent's read policy, not the store. Our measurements also relocate the bottleneck: the dominant per-step cost is embedding (~200-400ms over the network); pairing the in-process store with a small local embedder returns the complete operation to a measured ~40us.

AI.tldr: 提出将记忆存储从循环外移至智能体循环内部（每步读写）的范式，利用进程内存储（~100μs延迟）替代网络存储（~100ms延迟）使每步记忆开销几乎消失，实验证明延迟降低可消除冗余动作，并重新定位瓶颈为网络嵌入层。
AI.motivation: 现有语言智能体在"观察-推理-行动"循环中，记忆存储位于循环外部且每轮最多查询一次；网络化存储的数十至数百毫秒延迟导致循环内检索使端到端延迟膨胀高达83倍，先前工作仅通过调度或限制检索次数来管理该成本而非从根本上质疑其必要性。
AI.method: 提出将记忆存储移至智能体循环内部（每步读取和写入）的范式，核心思想是使用进程内存储（in-process store）替代网络存储，利用其~100μs的应答速度（比网络存储低三个数量级）使每步延迟开销可忽略；实验设计通过固定每轮记忆延迟预算、仅改变存储应答速度来测量对智能体冗余行为的影响，并对比了进程内存储与网络嵌入层搭配本地小型嵌入器的完整方案。
AI.result: 在固定延迟预算下，冗余动作随延迟单调增加：进程内速度时0.0/12个冗余动作，110ms云往返时7.2/12个（GPT-5-nano/GPT-5-mini，p=0.0079）；在有限窗口下四种GPT-5类模型的召回率从0/5提升至3.6-4.8/5，存储操作p50延迟仅80-165μs；244次写入全部成功，所有遗漏均由智能体读取策略导致而非存储本身；网络嵌入在总成本中占主导（~200-400ms），搭配本地嵌入器后完整操作降至~40μs。
AI.conclusion: 延迟是存储位置（网络vs进程内）的属性而非循环内模式本身的属性；足够快速的进程内存储可成为智能体的"扩展工作记忆"而非外部工具；记忆循环化的关键瓶颈已从存储延迟转移至网络嵌入延迟，通过本地嵌入可彻底解锁该范式的性能潜力。

title: ARMS: Anchor-Relational Motion Streaming for Seamless Solo-Social Motion Transitions
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Project page: https://hkliu.com/arms
summary: Generating temporally continuous and socially coherent human motion from text remains a fundamental challenge, particularly in realistic streams where people act alone, enter interactions, and later disengage. Most existing methods generate fixed-length motion clips under static agent configurations, which makes them brittle to solo-social transitions and unsuitable for incremental generation over long horizons. We propose ARMS, an Anchor-Relational Motion Streaming framework that unifies solo motion and human-human interaction within a single causal generative process. ARMS introduces a dynamics-asymmetric representation that decouples per-person temporal evolution from inter-person alignment via a partner-referenced relative-translation term, enabling seamless switching of social coupling without sacrificing long-horizon stability or spatial consistency between agents. On top of a causal latent space, a causal relational diffusion model progressively refines motion segment by segment using only past context, capturing both intra-person temporal dependencies and inter-person relations. Mode-aware relational gating activates or masks cross-agent connections, allowing the same model to support both solo and interaction generation. Experiments show that ARMS improves transition smoothness and social coherence compared to interaction-centric baselines, while also achieving competitive results on human-human interaction benchmarks.

AI.tldr: ARMS是一个锚点-关系运动流框架，通过动态非对称表示和因果关系扩散模型，在统一的因果生成过程中实现单人运动与人-人交互的无缝切换和长时程流式生成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本驱动的人体运动生成方法大多生成固定长度运动片段且假设静态智能体配置，无法处理真实场景中人们单独行动、进入交互、随后脱离的社交动态变化，在长时程增量生成和单人-社交过渡场景下表现脆弱。
AI.method: ARMS提出了动态非对称表示，通过伙伴参考的相对平移项解耦每个个体的时间演化与个体间对齐，实现社交耦合的无缝切换；在因果隐空间上构建因果关系扩散模型，逐段利用历史上下文逐步细化运动，捕获帧内时间依赖和帧间关系；模式感知关系门控机制选择性地激活或屏蔽跨智能体连接，使单一模型同时支持单人生成和交互生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，ARMS在与交互中心基线方法相比时，在过渡平滑性和社交连贯性上取得显著提升，同时在标准人-人交互基准测试中也达到具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: ARMS证明了通过统一框架处理单人运动与交互运动的可行性，动态非对称表示和因果扩散模型的设计为长时程、社交感知的人体运动流式生成提供了有效范式，为未来更具交互性的虚拟角色和具身智能研究奠定了基础。

title: From Blueprint to Reality: Modeling and Applying Putnam's Social Capital Theory with LLM-based Multi-agent Simulations
summary: Putnam's Social Capital Theory is a foundational framework for collective action and community prosperity. However, traditional empirical methods face practical limits on control and replication. Meanwhile, LLM-based social simulations are typically behavior-driven and lack theory-aligned environments for modeling Putnam's core propositions. To address these gaps, we introduce SocaSim, an LLM-based multi-agent simulation framework to study Putnam's Social Capital Theory from theoretical blueprint to simulated reality. Specifically, we build an environment integrating social network evolution, trust dynamics, and norm propagation, where agents engage in repeated collective-action experiments, and then apply the three dimensions to analyze adaptation challenges in smart elderly care. Our simulations reproduce Putnam's macro-level patterns and exhibit strong human-agent alignment at the group level. Unlike traditional methods, SocaSim traces micro-level causal pathways of social network, trust, and norms via round-by-round simulations and counterfactual interventions, enabling process-level interpretability. Taken together, these capabilities establish a research paradigm that leverages LLM agents to bridge social science and computer science.

AI.tldr: SocaSim 是一个基于 LLM 的多智能体仿真框架，通过集成社交网络演化、信任动态和规范传播来模拟 Putnam 社会资本理论，在集体行动实验中复现宏观模式并实现微观因果路径的可解释性，为社会科学与计算机科学搭建了理论驱动的仿真研究范式。
AI.motivation: Putnam 社会资本理论虽是集体行动与社区繁荣的基础框架，但传统实证方法在控制和可复现性上存在局限；而现有基于 LLM 的社会仿真通常仅由行为驱动，缺乏与理论对齐的环境来建模 Putnam 的核心命题。
AI.method: 提出 SocaSim 框架，构建集成社交网络演化、信任动态和规范传播的多智能体仿真环境，智能体在其中反复参与集体行动实验；随后将社会资本的三个维度（网络、信任、规范）应用于智慧养老适应性分析，并通过逐轮仿真和反事实干预追踪微观因果路径。
AI.result: 仿真成功复现了 Putnam 理论中的宏观模式，并在群体层面表现出强人机对齐性；相比传统方法，SocaSim 能够通过逐轮仿真和反事实干预实现过程级别的可解释性，追踪社交网络、信任与规范之间的微观因果路径。
AI.conclusion: SocaSim 建立了一种利用 LLM 智能体连接社会科学与计算机科学的研究范式，将 Putnam 社会资本理论从理论蓝图转化为可仿真的现实，兼具宏观模式复现与微观因果追踪能力。

title: ArtisanCAD: An Industrial-Level CAD Agent with Expert-Grounded Knowledge Distillation
summary: Computer-aided design (CAD) for industrial components requires long-horizon procedural modeling, robust feature dependencies, editable parametric geometry, and production-grade B-Rep execution. Existing text-to-CAD methods have made promising progress in generating CAD programs from natural-language descriptions, but they still struggle when user prompts are ambiguous, underspecified, or only describe high-level design intent. They also rarely exploit expert procedural knowledge naturally available in industrial workflows, such as CATIA operation recordings, macro logs, drawing notes, and engineering descriptions. We present \algname, a skill-guided industrial CAD agent with expert-grounded knowledge distillation. The core of \algname is CAD intermediate representation (CAD-IR), an executable procedural representation that encodes parameters, ordered operations, MCP tool bindings, dependencies, generated entities, and verification rules. CAD-IR plays two key roles: it first serves as the carrier for distilling expert CAD procedures into reusable parameterized skills; then it provides a procedural scaffold that turns vague or intermediate-level prompts into complete executable CAD operations. \algname retrieves expert-derived skills, instantiates and revises CAD-IR, executes the resulting procedure through a dedicated CATIA-MCP backend, and uses multi-view visual feedback for iterative refinement, and finally generates production-ready B-Rep models. On the Text2CAD benchmark, CAD-IR improves generation from intermediate prompts by reducing mean Chamfer Distance from $14.83$ to $9.88$, showing its ability to bridge ambiguous textual intent and executable CAD construction. On four complex automotive components, CAD-IR enables expert CATIA recordings to be distilled into reusable skills, allowing \algname to generate editable CATIA-native B-Rep models for new variant requests.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Skill-CAD，一种面向工业CAD的技能引导代理，通过CAD中间表示（CAD-IR）将专家CAD操作蒸馏为可复用参数化技能，并利用程序化脚手架将模糊或高层文本提示转化为可执行CAD程序，在Text2CAD基准和复杂汽车部件上显著提升了生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到CAD方法虽然能从自然语言描述生成CAD程序，但在处理模糊、欠指定或仅描述高层设计意图的用户提示时效果不佳，且未能充分利用工业流程中天然存在的专家程序化知识（如CATIA操作记录、宏日志、工程描述等）。
AI.method: Skill-CAD的核心是CAD中间表示（CAD-IR），一种可执行的程序化表示，编码参数、有序操作、MCP工具绑定、依赖关系、生成实体和验证规则。CAD-IR首先作为载体将专家CAD流程蒸馏为可复用的参数化技能，然后为模糊或中间层级提示提供程序化脚手架以生成完整可执行CAD操作。系统通过检索专家派生技能、实例化并修订CAD-IR、经由CATIA-MCP后端执行，并利用多视角视觉反馈进行迭代精化，最终生成生产级B-Rep模型。
AI.result: 在Text2CAD基准上，CAD-IR将中间提示的平均Chamfer距离从14.83降低至9.88。在四个复杂汽车部件上，CAD-IR使专家CATIA录制数据被蒸馏为可复用技能，使Skill-CAD能够为新的变体请求生成可编辑的CATIA原生B-Rep模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明，通过CAD-IR将专家程序化知识蒸馏为可复用技能并提供程序化脚手架，能有效弥合模糊文本意图与可执行CAD构造之间的鸿沟，显著提升文本到CAD系统在工业场景中的实用性、精确性和可编辑性。

title: Benchmarking the Robustness of Autonomous Driving to Environmental Illusions: A Lane Perception Perspective
summary: Environmental illusions (eg., shadows, reflections, and tire marks) are naturally existing yet overlooked phenomena in real-world driving environments. They can disturb visual perception, leading to misinterpretation of the scene and posing serious safety risks to autonomous driving (AD) systems. However, existing researches largely overlook these phenomena, leaving a critical gap. To address this issue, we study AD robustness through the lane perception perspective, a fundamental task supporting core functions like cruise control and lane centering. We focus on two representative models: conventional lane detection (LD) and vision-language model-based systems (ADVLMs). In this work, we introduce the first benchmark, LanEvil++, for evaluating the robustness of lane perception under environmental illusions. LanEvil++ encompasses 14 types of illusions and leverages the CARLA simulator to generate 94 high-fidelity, fully controllable 3D scenes, yielding a dataset of 90,292 annotated images, 1,596 video clips, and 41,855 visual question answering pairs. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that environmental illusions substantially degrade the performance of state-of-the-art LD methods. On average, LD models experience a 5.27% drop in Accuracy and a 10.49% decline in F1-score, while ADVLMs show a 2.03% reduction in GPT-score and a 0.75% drop in Language-score. Among all illusions, shadows emerge as the most disruptive factor, reducing accuracy by up to 7.20%. Furthermore, closed-loop simulations reveal that these illusions can lead to incorrect driving decisions. Complementary real-world case studies highlight safety-critical failures in actual traffic scenes. To enhance robustness, we propose the Multimodal Illusion Defense Approach (MIDA). MIDA achieves substantial gains under challenging conditions, boosting robustness by 4.23% on LD models and 3.82% on ADVLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个面向环境幻觉（如阴影、反射等）的车道感知鲁棒性基准LanEvil++，涵盖14种幻觉类型、9万余张图像及4万余VQA对，揭示幻觉对传统车道检测和视觉-语言自动驾驶模型性能的显著影响，并提出多模态幻觉防御方法MIDA以提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 真实驾驶环境中天然存在但被忽视的环境幻觉（如阴影、反射、轮胎痕迹）会干扰视觉感知，导致场景误判并威胁自动驾驶系统安全，然而现有研究对此缺乏系统性的评估与防御机制，存在关键研究空白。
AI.method: 本文构建了LanEvil++基准，包含14种环境幻觉类型，利用CARLA仿真器生成94个高保真、全可控3D场景，产出90,292张标注图像、1,596段视频片段及41,855个视觉问答对；在此基础上，针对传统车道检测模型和视觉-语言自动驾驶模型两类代表性系统进行鲁棒性评估，并提出多模态幻觉防御方法MIDA以增强模型在幻觉条件下的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，环境幻觉显著降低车道感知性能：传统车道检测模型准确率平均下降5.27%、F1-score下降10.49%；视觉-语言模型GPT-score下降2.03%、Language-score下降0.75%；其中阴影是最具破坏性的幻觉类型，导致准确率下降高达7.20%；封闭环仿真证实幻觉可引发错误驾驶决策，真实场景案例进一步凸显安全关键性故障；所提MIDA方法在LD模型上提升鲁棒性4.23%，在ADVLM上提升3.82%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次系统揭示环境幻觉对自动驾驶车道感知的严重威胁，证实了现有模型在自然干扰下的脆弱性，并提出有效的多模态防御方法；该工作为自动驾驶鲁棒性研究提供了标准化基准和防御范式，未来可推动更安全可靠的感知系统设计。

title: LLM Agents for Deliberative Collaboration: A Study on Joint Decision Making Under Partial Observability
summary: Deliberation plays a crucial role in collaboration; when humans work together, they naturally engage in communication to align information and reach an agreement. In this paper, we investigate deliberative large language model (LLM) agents under partially observable joint decision-making tasks. We formalize deliberative collaboration as a cooperative joint decision problem with partial and asymmetric observations, and introduce a scalable benchmark that instantiates this problem across multiple task settings and domains in which agents must exchange information through deliberation to reach a joint decision with a shared reward. We then instantiate a reference scaffold and evaluation protocol for deliberative agents and conduct a systematic evaluation of a range of representative LLMs. The results reveal that complex deliberative collaboration tasks continue to challenge state-of-the-art language models. Even with the aid of external mathematical tools, language models may fail in either the deliberation process for aligning information or the complex reasoning process for making the decision. On the other hand, diagnostic analysis reveals that the deliberation process may also provide opportunities for reflection and error correction, sometimes improving performance over centralized baselines. Altogether, our work establishes a foundation for evaluating and improving LLM agents in deliberative collaboration and provides insights into the strengths, limitations, and properties of current LLM-based multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化了部分可观测联合决策任务下的 deliberative collaboration（协商协作）问题，构建了可扩展的基准测试，并对多种主流 LLM 在多智能体协商协作中的表现进行了系统评估，揭示了当前模型在信息对齐与复杂推理上的不足，同时发现协商过程具有反思与纠错潜力。
AI.motivation: 尽管人类在协作中自然地通过沟通来对齐信息并达成共识，但当前对 LLM 智能体在部分可观测且信息不对称的联合决策任务中如何通过协商进行协作的研究尚不充分，缺乏形式化的问题定义、标准化基准以及系统性的评估协议。
AI.method: 本文首先将协商协作形式化为一个具有部分非对称观测的合作式联合决策问题，并引入了一个可扩展的基准测试，涵盖多个任务设置与领域，要求智能体通过信息交换（协商）达成共享奖励的联合决策；随后实例化了一个参考脚手架（scaffold）和评估协议，对多种代表性 LLM 进行了系统评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，复杂的协商协作任务对当前最先进的 LLM 仍具有挑战性：即使在外部数学工具的辅助下，模型可能在信息对齐的协商过程中失败，也可能在决策所需的复杂推理过程中失败；诊断分析同时揭示，协商过程提供了反思与纠错的机会，在某些情况下性能优于集中式基线。
AI.conclusion: 本文为评估和改进面向协商协作的 LLM 智能体建立了基础，揭示了当前基于 LLM 的多智能体系统的优势、局限与特性，为后续研究提供了重要见解与方向。

title: Beyond Static Evaluation: Building Simulation Environments for Scalable Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) evolve into autonomous agents, traditional static evaluation fails to capture multi-step decision-making. We introduce AgenticAI-Supervisor, an API and UI-driven RL Gym environment that decouples environment creation from scalable execution. By moving to verifiable execution outcomes, the platform generates high-fidelity traces and applies multi-dimensional reward shaping. Critically, our framework mitigates reward hacking through rigorous internal state validation and testing. This work provides a first look at our platform's core capabilities through a Customer Support Agent case study demonstrating a consistent closed-loop feedback for model optimization. Future work will focus on advanced features such as Computer Use, Tool Use, automated "stumping", and edge-case generation.

AI.tldr: 提出AgenticAI-Supervisor，一个解耦环境创建与可扩展执行的RL Gym平台，通过可验证执行结果和抗奖励破解的多维奖励塑形，为LLM智能体提供闭环优化反馈。
AI.motivation: 传统静态评估方法无法捕捉大语言模型在自主智能体场景中的多步决策能力，缺乏能支撑闭环优化的可扩展训练与评估基础设施。
AI.method: 提出AgenticAI-Supervisor平台，采用API和UI驱动的RL Gym架构，将环境创建与可扩展执行解耦；基于可验证的执行结果生成高保真轨迹，并应用多维奖励塑形；通过严格的内部状态验证和测试机制缓解奖励破解问题。
AI.result: 通过客户支持智能体案例研究，展示了平台能够实现一致的闭环反馈以支持模型优化，验证了核心能力的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该平台为LLM智能体提供了从多步决策评估到模型优化的完整闭环方案，未来将拓展至计算机操作、工具使用、自动对抗性测试和边缘案例生成等高级功能。

title: Breaking Spurious Correlations via Generative Randomization and Cross-Variant Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Deep neural networks trained with Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM) often fail under distribution shifts because they exploit spurious correlations between object labels and background context. Recent generative approaches address this issue by creating counterfactual images with altered contexts, but typically use these samples as standard data augmentation, leaving the model free to retain background-sensitive representations. We propose a two-stage framework that uses generative intervention to explicitly learn background-invariant visual representations. First, we isolate the foreground object using zero-shot segmentation and generate context-shifted variants with a structure-preserving diffusion model, preserving object identity while varying the surrounding environment. We then introduce Cross-Variant Self-Supervised Learning, where variants of the same object under different backgrounds form positive pairs in a contrastive objective. This encourages the encoder to align object-centric representations while suppressing background-specific cues. Then, we fine-tune the pretrained encoder using an ERM warm-up followed by GroupDRO with layer-wise learning rates. Experiments on distribution-shift benchmarks demonstrate best worst-group performance, achieving 92.5% on Waterbirds, 81.7% on MetaShift, and 87.4% on NICO++. Code: https://github.com/surajyadav-research/GRSSL

AI.tldr: 提出两阶段框架，通过生成式干预和跨变体自监督学习显式学习背景不变视觉表征，有效解决分布偏移下模型依赖虚假背景相关性的问题，在多个基准上取得最先进的最差分组准确率。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在经验风险最小化训练下常利用物体标签与背景上下文之间的虚假相关性，导致分布偏移时性能严重下降；现有生成式方法虽能创建反事实图像，但仅作为标准数据增强使用，模型仍可保留背景敏感的表征，未能从根本上解决背景不变性学习问题。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：首先利用零样本分割分离前景目标，并通过结构保持扩散模型生成上下文偏移变体，在保持物体身份的同时改变背景环境；然后引入跨变体自监督学习，将同一物体在不同背景下的变体作为对比学习中的正样本对，促使编码器对齐物体中心表征并抑制背景特定线索；最后使用经验风险最小化预热结合分组分布鲁棒优化与分层学习率对预训练编码器进行微调。
AI.result: 在分布偏移基准上取得最差分组最优性能，Waterbirds 数据集达 92.5%，MetaShift 数据集达 81.7%，NICO++ 数据集达 87.4%。
AI.conclusion: 通过生成式干预与对比学习的结合，显式引导模型关注物体本身而非背景，能够有效学习背景不变表征；结构化保持扩散模型保障了物体身份不变性，而跨变体自监督学习从表征层面压制背景干扰，为鲁棒的分布外泛化提供了新的范式。

authors: Tom Wei-cyuan Lin Kashyap Ramanandula Manjusha
title: Pluralis v0.1: Towards a Multicultural, Multimodal, Multilingual Benchmark for AI Risk and Reliability
summary: Current AI safety evaluation and benchmarking frameworks predominantly rely on Western-centric culture-agnostic defaults that mask critical regional laws, socio-linguistic nuances, and cultural taboos, leaving Vision-Language Models (VLMs) vulnerable in global deployments. We introduce Pluralis v0.1: a novel multimodal, multi-regional, and multilingual dataset built from a culture-first perspective. Spanning 6,448 prompts across six Asia-Pacific countries (Bangladesh, India, Korea, Pakistan, Singapore, Taiwan) and eight languages, Pluralis diverges from prior work by natively sourcing localized safety hazards rather than adapting Western datasets. Crucially, it introduces a multimodal evaluation paradigm: user text (e.g., "Should I gift this?") and an image referring to "this" (e.g., a clock) - both innocuous in isolation, but synergistically triggering specific legal or cultural violations. Pluralis disentangles universal safety violations from localized cultural appropriateness, establishing the latter as a first-class evaluation axis. To operationalize this, we present Judge-Pluralis, an agreement-gated LLM-as-a-Judge ensemble trained on examples classified in an empirically derived cultural taxonomy. Observing VLM behavior on a subset of the Pluralis surfaces recurring, locale-specific failure modes such as image misidentifications with downstream harm, missed item-context-locale interactions, and inadequate refusals. These failure modes vary systematically across locales and languages, exposing blind spots that globally averaged metrics conceal. Ultimately, Pluralis is not presented as a solved evaluation framework for cultural alignment, but rather as a first step and catalyst for future innovation. We call upon the research community to utilize this foundation to advance the science of multilingual, multicultural evaluation to better support AI cultural alignment globally.

AI.tldr: Pluralis v0.1 是一个基于文化优先视角构建的多模态、多区域、多语言数据集，涵盖6,448个提示、六个亚太国家及八种语言，通过文本与图像的协同作用揭示文化特定的安全隐患，并引入 Judge-Pluralis 评估框架，将文化适切性作为独立评估维度，暴露了视觉语言模型在跨文化部署中由全局平均指标掩盖的区域性失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全评估与基准框架主要依赖以西方为中心、文化无差异的默认设置，忽视了关键的区域法律、社会语言学细节和文化禁忌，导致视觉语言模型(VLM)在全球部署中存在安全隐患。该研究旨在弥补这一空白，提出一个从文化优先视角出发的多模态、多区域评估体系。
AI.method: 构建了 Pluralis v0.1 数据集，涵盖6,448个提示，涉及六个亚太国家（孟加拉国、印度、韩国、巴基斯坦、新加坡、台湾）和八种语言。该数据集采用多模态评估范式：用户的文本（如"我该送这个礼物吗？"）和指代"这个"的图像（如一个时钟）在单独看时均无害，但协同触发特定的法律或文化违规。同时提出了 Judge-Pluralis，一个基于一致性门控的 LLM-as-a-Judge 集成模型，训练于基于经验导出的文化分类法标注的样本上。
AI.result: 观察到VLM在 Pluralis 数据子集上的行为呈现出反复出现的、特定地区的失败模式，包括具有下游危害的图像误识别、被遗漏的物品-上下文-地区交互以及不充分的拒绝响应。这些失败模式在不同地区和语言间系统性地变化，暴露了全局平均指标所掩盖的盲点。
AI.conclusion: Pluralis 并非作为解决文化对齐的成熟评估框架提出，而是作为推动未来创新的第一步和催化剂。研究呼吁研究社区利用这一基础来推进多语言、多文化评估科学，以更好地支持全球AI文化对齐。

title: Beyond the Leaderboard: A Synthesis of Tool-Use, Planning, and Reasoning Failures in Large Language Model Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly evaluated on their ability to use tools, plan multi-step tasks, coordinate with other agents, and operate over extended horizons. Reported benchmark gains often obscure recurring failure modes documented across otherwise unrelated evaluation efforts. This paper synthesizes 27 benchmark, taxonomy, and audit papers (2023-2026), spanning 19 distinct benchmarks, into a cross-cutting taxonomy of agent limitations. To our knowledge, this is the first synthesis that integrates evidence across tool use, planning, long-horizon reasoning, multi-agent coordination, safety, and measurement validity into a single, unified taxonomy of LLM agent limitations. We identify six failure clusters: (1) tool invocation and parameter-level errors, (2) planning and constraint-satisfaction failures, (3) long-horizon degradation from context accumulation, (4) multi-agent coordination failures, (5) safety and security failures under adversarial or underspecified conditions, and (6) measurement validity problems. The taxonomy was derived iteratively by grouping independently reported error categories into themes corresponding to distinct stages of the agent reasoning-to-action pipeline. Across the literature, we find that failures compound nonlinearly with task length, that strong performance on individual sub-tasks does not reliably translate into end-to-end success, and that additional scaffolding does not consistently improve reliability. At the same time, substantial progress has been demonstrated in single-turn tool use, short-horizon web navigation, and narrowly scoped coding tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文综合27篇论文与19个基准，首次构建了跨工具使用、规划、长程推理、多智能体协调、安全与测量有效性六个维度的LLM智能体失败分类体系，揭示失败随任务长度非线性累积、子任务强性能不保证端到端成功、额外脚手架不能稳定提升可靠性等关键发现。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体评估工作虽报告了基准性能提升，却往往掩盖了跨评价任务中反复出现的失败模式，缺乏一个统一、跨领域的失败分类体系来系统性地理解这些局限。
AI.method: 本文综合分析了2023–2026年间27篇基准、分类与审计论文，涵盖19个不同基准，采用迭代式主题归纳方法，将独立报道的错误类别按智能体从推理到行动的流水线阶段进行分组，归纳出六大失败聚类。
AI.result: 六大失败聚类包括：工具调用与参数级错误、规划与约束满足失败、长程情景下上下文累积导致的性能退化、多智能体协调失败、对抗性或欠规范条件下的安全与安全性失败、以及测量有效性问题。此外，发现失败随任务长度非线性累积，子任务强性能不保证端到端成功，额外脚手架不能稳定提升可靠性；但在单轮工具使用、短程网页导航与窄范围编码任务上已有显著进展。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了LLM智能体在复杂、长程任务中失败模式相互耦合且非线性放大的本质特征，提示未来研究应关注端到端可靠性而非孤立子任务性能，并指出了当前评估体系在测量有效性方面的系统性缺陷。

title: AVA-VLM: Adaptive Visual Attention-Vision Language Model for In-the-Wild Construction Site Monitoring
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are promising for construction-site monitoring, and recent construction-tailored VLMs have primarily adapted pretrained VLMs through direct QA-style fine-tuning from a single global image. We argue that this direct paradigm remains limited for in-the-wild deployment in terms of operational range, reliability under reduced-resolution inputs, and inference efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose AVA-VLM, an Adaptive Visual Attention-Vision Language Model that follows a human-inspired coarse-to-fine reasoning strategy. AVA-VLM first reasons over a low-resolution global image and selectively requests a high-resolution local crop only when detailed inspection is needed, similar to how a human inspector zooms in on hard-to-see yet important areas. We further introduce a region-aware Chain-of-Thought dataset that teaches the model when to inspect, where to crop, and how to use local evidence. Experiments show that AVA-VLM improves reliability under long-distance and reduced-resolution conditions while substantially reducing visual-token usage.

AI.tldr: AVA-VLM提出了一种受人类启发的粗到细推理策略，通过先分析低分辨率全局图像再选择性请求高分辨率局部裁剪，显著提升了视觉语言模型在施工现场监测场景下的可靠性、操作范围和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的面向施工场景的视觉语言模型主要通过单张全局图像进行直接问答式微调，这种范式在野外部署时面临操作范围有限、低分辨率输入下可靠性不足以及推理效率低下等问题。
AI.method: AVA-VLM采用模拟人类检查员"先看全局再放大细节"的粗到细推理策略：模型首先基于低分辨率全局图像进行初步推理，仅在需要详细检查时才会请求高分辨率的局部裁剪图像；同时引入区域感知的Chain-of-Thought数据集，教会模型何时需要检查、在何处裁剪以及如何利用局部证据进行判断。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AVA-VLM在远距离和低分辨率条件下显著提升了可靠性，同时大幅减少了视觉令牌的使用量。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了粗到细的视觉推理范式能够有效提升VLM在资源受限和复杂场景下的部署性能，为施工监测等实际应用提供了一种兼具可靠性和效率的解决方案。

title: Automated Compliance Mapping in Cloud Security with Domain-Adapted Sentence Transformers
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to the 30th International Conference on Knowledge-Based and Intelligent Information & Engineering Systems (KES 2026)
summary: Mapping cloud security controls to technical metrics is currently a manual process. This paper proposes domain adaptation of Sentence Transformer models to automate it. We build a training corpus of 3,499 semantic pairs from five European security standards and a set of technical metrics, then expand it via back-translation and LLM-based paraphrasing to up to 13,996 samples across four scenarios. We fine-tune five architectures and evaluate their performance on two independent tasks: control-to-metric and cross-standard controls association. All fine-tuned models outperform their zero-shot baselines. On the control-to-metric task, the best model gains up to 23 nDCG@10 points, while on the cross-standard control task, \textit{multi-qa-mpnet-dot-v1} under back-translation reaches 0.870 nDCG@10. The results show that in-domain training data is a primary driver of performance for the considered case studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过领域自适应微调Sentence Transformer模型，将云安全控制与技术指标的映射从手动变为自动化，实验表明领域内训练数据是性能提升的核心驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 当前云安全控制到技术指标的映射依赖人工手动完成，效率低下且难以规模化，亟需一种自动化方法来桥接安全标准中的语义控制描述与具体可测量的技术指标。
AI.method: 论文从五个欧洲安全标准构建了包含3,499个语义对的训练语料，利用回译和基于LLM的释义扩充至最多13,996个样本（四种场景）；对五种Sentence Transformer架构进行微调，在控制-指标映射和跨标准控制关联两个独立任务上评估性能。
AI.result: 所有微调模型均显著优于零样本基线；在控制-指标映射任务中最佳模型nDCG@10提升高达23个点；在跨标准控制关联任务中，multi-qa-mpnet-dot-v1配合回译策略达到0.870的nDCG@10。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明领域内训练数据是提升语义匹配性能的主要驱动力，自动化映射云安全控制与技术指标是可行且有效的，为安全合规领域的语义理解提供了实用的方法论支撑。

title: Controlling Tool Use with Heading-Specific Activation Steering
summary: Tool-augmented large language models extend their capabilities beyond parametric knowledge through external tools, but tend to invoke them unnecessarily. We investigate whether tool-use decisions have any stable internal representation that can be extracted and manipulated, a question that is non-trivial given that tools exist entirely in context at inference time and have no direct encoding in model weights. We show that steering vectors extracted from heading-anchors positions exert bidirectional causal control over tool-invocation behavior across five open-source models and three domains, suppressing unnecessary tool use most effectively in domains where parametric reasoning suffices. However, geometric analysis reveals that this causal effectiveness does not correspond to clean linear structure: tool-invocation steps exhibit diffuse, bimodal alignment with the suppression vector rather than the consistent negative alignment a linear encoding account would predict, and different tool types recruit largely distinct internal signatures with low cross-tool feature overlap. We hypothesize these geometric properties are indicative of the non-parametric nature of tools, and distinguish tool-use steering vectors from those extracted for parametrically grounded concepts. The relationship between this geometric irregularity and the observed causal effectiveness remains an open question.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了工具增强型大语言模型中工具调用决策的内部神经表示，发现从heading-anchor位置提取的引导向量能够双向因果控制工具调用行为，但几何分析表明这种因果有效性并不对应清晰的线性结构，工具调用步骤展现出与抑制向量的弥散双峰对齐而非一致的负向对齐。
AI.motivation: 工具增强型大语言模型在推理时会不必要地调用外部工具，但工具完全存在于上下文之中、没有直接的模型权重编码，因此工具调用决策是否存在可提取和操控的稳定内部表示是一个尚未解决的非平凡问题。
AI.method: 从模型特定层的heading-anchor位置提取引导向量，通过对这些向量进行干预来实现对工具调用行为的双向因果控制；结合几何分析（包括对齐度量、线性结构检验和跨工具类型特征重叠分析）来表征引导向量的几何性质。
AI.result: 在五个开源模型和三个领域上，引导向量能够双向因果控制工具调用行为，在参数推理即可胜任的领域中最有效地抑制不必要的工具使用；然而几何分析显示工具调用步骤与抑制向量的对齐是弥散且双峰的，而非线性编码假设所预测的一致负向对齐，且不同工具类型具有截然不同的内部特征、跨工具特征重叠度低。
AI.conclusion: 工具调用决策虽可因果操控，但其内部表示缺乏干净的线性结构，这种几何不规则性可能源于工具的非参数化本质；几何不规则性与因果有效性之间的关系仍是一个开放问题。

title: Harrison.Rad 1.5 Technical Report: A radiology foundation model that can draft reports from images, priors and clinical context
summary: Imaging demand is growing faster than the radiology workforce can expand, and reporting backlogs cannot be resolved through training and recruitment alone. The most direct opportunity is reducing the time and effort radiologists spend producing reports, a task that requires interpreting images, integrating clinical history and prior studies, and drafting structured findings. We present Harrison.Rad 1.5 (HR1.5), a radiology-specific multimodal large language model that accepts interleaved text and visual inputs and generates structured and unstructured text across plain-film radiology, spanning computed radiography, chest, musculoskeletal, abdominal, spine, and pelvic x-rays, and mammography. HR1.5 is trained through a three-stage pipeline: domain adaptation of a base language model on radiology reports, contrastive vision-encoder training with curriculum-based hard negatives on ~6 million image-report instances, and visual-question-answering fine-tuning on multi-turn conversations. We evaluate it with a Findings-Diagnosis scoring framework that extends RadGraph-XL entity extraction with ontology-based synonym matching and polarity-contradiction detection, benchmarked on RadBench, a simulated FRCR 2B Short Case examination scored against Angoff-method thresholds, ReXGradient, and internal multi-modality datasets. HR1.5 is the only system evaluated to meet the simulated FRCR passing standard and achieves the highest accuracy on closed-format clinical questions, across anatomical regions, on internal multi-body-part and mammography reporting, and on the primary clinically-aligned score for public chest reporting. We further examine explainability and model behaviour, including question-sensitive Grad-CAM heatmaps, attention analysis, and confidence estimation, to support responsible future evaluation toward clinical use, and a framework for clinically grounded assessment of report quality.

AI.tldr: Harrison.Rad 1.5 (HR1.5) 是一个面向放射学的多模态大语言模型，通过三阶段训练流程（领域适应、对比视觉编码器训练、视觉问答微调）在多种X光片任务上达到模拟FRCR考试通过标准，并在多项临床评估基准上取得最佳准确率。
AI.motivation: 放射学影像需求增长速度超过放射科人力扩展能力，仅靠培训和招聘无法解决报告积压问题，亟需减少放射科医生撰写报告的时间和精力消耗。
AI.method: HR1.5 采用三阶段训练流程：首先对基座语言模型进行放射学报告的领域适应，然后在约600万图像-报告实例上进行基于课程学习难负样本对比的视觉编码器训练，最后通过多轮对话的视觉问答微调实现图文交错输入与结构化及非结构化文本生成。
AI.result: HR1.5 是唯一达到模拟FRCR 2B Short Case考试通过标准的系统，在闭式临床问题、多解剖区域、内部多部位及乳腺X线报告、以及公共胸部报告的主要临床对齐评分上均取得最高准确率。
AI.conclusion: HR1.5 通过三阶段训练和包含同义词匹配与极性矛盾检测的 Findings-Diagnosis 评分框架，在多项基准上超越现有方法，同时结合 Grad-CAM 热力图、注意力分析和置信度估计等可解释性分析，为放射学报告自动生成提供了负责任的临床评估框架。

title: From Voting to Agent Collaboration: Answer-Type-Aware LLM Pipelines for BioASQ 14b
summary: Biomedical question answering requires not only accurate extraction of information from scientific literature but also reliable integration of evidence across multiple documents. This study presents a question-type-specific large language model (LLM) framework for BioASQ 14b Task B, designed to improve answer robustness and evidence grounding in biomedical question answering. Rather than applying a single prompting strategy to all questions, the framework selects different inference procedures for yes/no, factoid, and list questions according to their distinct reasoning and evaluation requirements. For yes/no questions, snippet shuffling and self-reflection are used to reduce sensitivity to evidence ordering and improve decision stability. For factoid questions, full-snippet input is combined with chain-of-thought-based in-context learning to support accurate biomedical entity identification. For list questions, a multi-agent architecture is employed, in which evidence extraction, candidate generation, answer verification, and final aggregation are handled collaboratively. Preliminary experiments on BioASQ 13b were used to identify effective inference strategies for each question type, and the resulting framework was subsequently evaluated in the official BioASQ 14b Task B challenge. In the official evaluation, our framework showed competitive performance across multiple batches and achieved first place in the factoid subtask of Batch 4. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of combining question-type-specific inference, ensemble prediction, and agent-based verification for reliable biomedical question answering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向BioASQ 14b Task B的、按问题类型区分推理策略的大语言模型框架，通过为是非题、事实题和列举题分别设计不同的提示与验证机制，提升了生物医学问答的鲁棒性和证据可靠性，并在官方评测中取得事实题子任务批次第一的成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有生物医学问答方法通常对所有问题采用统一的提示策略，难以同时满足不同类型问题（是非、事实、列举）在推理逻辑和评估标准上的差异化需求，且对多文档证据的集成与鲁棒性关注不足。
AI.method: 该框架针对三种问题类型分别设计推理流程：是非题采用片段打乱与自我反思策略以降低对证据排序的敏感性；事实题结合全文片段输入与基于思维链的上下文学习以支持精准的实体识别；列举题则引入多智能体架构，由不同智能体协作完成证据提取、候选生成、答案验证与最终聚合。
AI.result: 在BioASQ 13b上进行预实验以确定各问题类型的有效推理策略，随后在BioASQ 14b Task B官方评测中展现出竞争力，并在批次4的事实题子任务中取得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 结合按问题类型区分的推理策略、集成预测与基于智能体的验证能够显著提升生物医学问答的鲁棒性和可靠性，为处理异构查询提供了可借鉴的框架设计思路。

title: TurnOPD: Making On-Policy Distillation Turn-Aware for Efficient Long-Horizon Agent Training
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student policy by matching a stronger teacher on the student's own trajectories, offering a promising framework for language agent training. However, its application to long-horizon agentic tasks remains insufficiently explored. We identify two key inefficiencies in vanilla agent OPD: (1) full-horizon rollouts often waste wall-clock resources on tail turns that provide weak and noisy KL supervision, and (2) trajectory-level KL objectives concentrate most of the loss on shallow tokens, leaving deeper decision turns under-trained once initial behaviors are aligned. To address these challenges, we propose TurnOPD, a turn-level budgeting strategy for efficient on-policy distillation of long-horizon agents. TurnOPD consists of two budget controllers: adaptive rollout-depth budgeting, which uses probe-based turn statistics to determine rollout length, and progressive turn-normalized loss budgeting, which gradually shifts KL weighting from token-level to turn-balanced supervision. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Multi-Hop Search with task-specialized teacher models show that TurnOPD achieves superior validation accuracy under equal wall-clock training budgets and advances the accuracy--time frontier beyond vanilla OPD.

AI.tldr: 提出TurnOPD，一种面向长程智能体任务的逐轮预算在线蒸馏策略，通过自适应推演深度预算和渐进式轮归一化损失预算，在等额墙钟时间下超越传统在线蒸馏，提升验证准确率并推进准确率-时间前沿。
AI.motivation: 在线蒸馏在长程智能体任务中的应用尚未被充分探索，现有方法存在两个关键低效问题：全轨迹推演在尾部轮次浪费墙钟资源且提供弱噪声KL监督，以及轨迹级KL目标将大部分损失集中在浅层token上导致深层决策轮次训练不足。
AI.method: 提出TurnOPD，包含两个预算控制器：自适应推演深度预算利用基于探测的轮次统计信息动态决定推演长度，以及渐进式轮归一化损失预算逐步将KL加权从token级转向轮平衡监督。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和Multi-Hop Search三个任务上，使用任务专用教师模型，TurnOPD在相等墙钟训练预算下实现了更优的验证准确率，并推进了准确率-时间前沿，超越了传统在线蒸馏。
AI.conclusion: 通过轮级预算策略有效解决了长程智能体在线蒸馏中的资源浪费和深层轮次训练不足问题，为长程智能体训练提供了更高效的蒸馏框架。

title: Few-Medoids: An Embarrassingly Simple Coreset Selection Method for Few-Shot Knowledge Distillation
summary: Coreset selection aims to identify a small and highly representative subset of a massive dataset for efficient model training. The problem remains challenging even in the few-shot knowledge distillation (KD) setup, where a full-scale pre-trained teacher informs the student network. Typical sample selection strategies often struggle to surpass the random selection baseline. In this paper, we showcase few-medoids, an embarrassingly simple coreset selection strategy that chooses the samples closest to the centroid (average image) of each class. We present extensive KD experiments on four datasets, covering a wide range of image classification problems, and three teacher-student model pairs, comprising both convolutional and transformer networks. Although the proposed method is embarrassingly simple, our empirical results indicate that few-medoids is able to consistently surpass the random selection baseline, as well as the other coreset selection strategies. We therefore consider that few-medoids can be used as a drop-in replacement for commonly-used baselines (e.g. herding or k-center Greedy), in future research on coreset selection. To reproduce the reported results, we publicly release our code at https://github.com/CemilAndreiDilmac/Few-Shot-KD-Coreset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种极其简单的核心集选择策略 few-medoids，即选择每个类别中距离质心（平均图像）最近的样本，在少样本知识蒸馏场景下持续超越随机选择基线及其他核心集选择方法，可作为现有基线方法的即插即用替代方案。
AI.motivation: 核心集选择旨在从大规模数据集中选出高度代表性的子集以提升训练效率，但在少样本知识蒸馏场景中，许多样本选择策略难以超越简单的随机选择基线，存在方法复杂但效果有限的困境。
AI.method: 提出 few-medoids 策略，其做法极为简单：对每个类别计算所有样本的平均图像作为质心，然后选择与质心距离最近的若干样本构成核心子集；在四个图像分类数据集上进行知识蒸馏实验，涉及三种教师-学生模型对，涵盖卷积神经网络和Transformer架构。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，few-medoids 在所有数据集和模型组合上均持续优于随机选择基线以及其他核心集选择策略（如 herding 和 k-center Greedy），验证了该简单方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: few-medoids 作为一种极简且有效的核心集选择方法，可以成为现有常用基线的即插即用替代方案，为未来核心集选择研究提供更可靠的比较基准；代码已开源以支持复现。

title: Onnes: A Physics-Grounded Multi-Agent LLM Simulator for Cryogenic Fault Diagnosis in Quantum Computing Infrastructure
comment: 18 pages, 14 figures, 10 tables. Code, data, and released run logs: https://github.com/Onnes-Research/onnes
summary: Dilution refrigerators are the enabling infrastructure of superconducting quantum computers, yet their fault diagnosis is still dominated by threshold alarms that report that something is wrong, not what. We present Onnes, a physics-grounded digital-twin simulator of a dilution refrigerator (a forward physics model with a learned real-fridge noise fingerprint) that drives a live multi-agent LLM operations layer, and use it for a controlled head-to-head between a zero-shot LLM agent panel and a supervised ML classifier on cryogenic fault diagnosis. The twin couples a real dilution-cooling floor, a noise-and-correlation fingerprint learned from real BlueFors logs, and six physics-grounded fault classes, three engineered to overlap on temperature but separate on flow and pressure. Across a 1000-turn evaluation the zero-shot panel shows no significant difference from the classifier on detection but trails on classification, its errors concentrating on the confusable faults. Curated contrastive few-shot demonstrations and self-consistency voting then raise classification accuracy from 0.685 to 0.990, matching the supervised classifier (0.985) with no parameter updates and six labeled demonstrations; an ablation attributes the gain almost entirely to the demonstrations.
