Run as a continuous monitor across a nine-run fault-by-seed sweep, the agent catches every developing fault within one poll interval, and a confidence gate suppresses pre-onset false alarms whose rate is backend-dependent. As a first sim-to-real check, a detector trained purely on real BlueFors telemetry posts a real-hardware false-alarm rate of 6.4% and 100% recall on physics faults injected onto real held-out windows. All numbers are drawn verbatim from released run logs.

AI.tldr: Onnes 提出一种基于物理数字孪生与多智能体 LLM 的稀释制冷机故障诊断系统，通过对比零样本 LLM 与监督分类器发现 LLM 在分类上存在不足，但经对比少样本演示和自一致性投票可将准确率从 0.685 提升至 0.990，接近监督分类器的 0.985，并在真实硬件上实现 100% 召回率和 6.4% 假阳性率。
AI.motivation: 当前稀释制冷机（超导量子计算机的关键基础设施）的故障诊断仍主要依赖阈值报警，只能报告异常发生但无法指明故障类型。现有方法缺乏结合物理模型与实时智能诊断的手段，亟需一种能同时利用物理先验知识与数据驱动方法的高精度、可解释的故障诊断系统。
AI.method: Onnes 系统包含三个核心组件：一是基于物理的数字孪生模拟器，包含真实稀释冷却曲线、从 BlueFors 日志中学习到的噪声与相关性指纹以及六种物理接地故障类（其中三种在温度上重叠但在流量与压力上可区分）；二是实时多智能体 LLM 操作层，使用零样本 LLM 面板进行故障诊断；三是对比少样本演示（curated contrastive few-shot demonstrations）与自一致性投票（self-consistency voting）增强机制，在不更新参数、仅使用六个标注演示的条件下提升分类性能。
AI.result: 在 1000 轮评估中，零样本 LLM 面板在故障检测上与监督分类器无显著差异，但在分类上存在不足，错误集中在易混淆的故障类型上。引入对比少样本演示与自一致性投票后，分类准确率从 0.685 提升至 0.990，与监督分类器（0.985）相当；消融实验表明改进几乎完全来自少样本演示。在九次按种子扫描的连续监控中，智能体在一个轮询间隔内捕获所有发展中的故障，置信度门控抑制了预发假阳性（其率取决于后端）。在真实硬件上，基于纯 BlueFors 遥测训练的检测器实现 6.4% 的假阳性率和 100% 的物理故障注入召回率。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，结合物理数字孪生与 LLM 智能体的方法在稀释制冷机故障诊断上能够以极少的标注样本达到与监督分类器媲美的精度，且无需参数更新；少样本演示是性能提升的关键因素。该框架为量子计算基础设施的智能运维提供了可扩展的 sim-to-real 路径，其置信度门控机制可有效控制误报率。

title: PolicyShiftGuard: Benchmarking and Improving Policy-Adaptive Image Guardrails
summary: Image guardrails are typically trained and evaluated under a fixed safety policy, implicitly treating safety as an intrinsic property of an image. Real deployments are different: the same image may be allowed in one product, restricted in another, and newly disallowed when a policy boundary changes. We study policy-adaptive image guardrailing, where a model must decide whether an image violates the currently supplied policy and generalize to held-out policy definitions. We introduce PolicyShiftBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 2,000 policy-discriminative instances over 265 images, where each image is paired with 7.55 policy-conditioned prompts on average to test whether models adapt to the active policy rather than relying on image-level safety priors. We then propose PolicyShiftGuard, a compact policy-conditioned guardrail trained with a two-stage training recipe that combines Randomized Policy SFT (RP-SFT) with Boundary-Pair Policy Adaptation (BP-Adapt). BP-Adapt trains matched prompts for the same image and risk category using standard label supervision and a pairwise comparison loss that separates blocking policies from passing policies. Experiments show that existing VLMs and specialized guardrails remain brittle under policy shifts, while PolicyShiftGuard substantially improves policy-sensitive performance. The 7B model achieves SOTA performance of 76.9 Avg. F1 and 72.1 Avg. PSS on PolicyShiftBench, transfers well to UnSafeBench and SafeEditBench, and improves the latency-performance trade-off with a concise output format. Ablations confirm that matched pass/block boundary pairs are essential for stable policy adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PolicyShiftBench基准测试和PolicyShiftGuard模型，解决图像护栏在策略自适应场景下的泛化问题。PolicyShiftGuard通过两阶段训练（RP-SFT + BP-Adapt）实现了策略条件下的图像违规检测，在7B模型上达到76.9平均F1和72.1平均PSS的SOTA性能，并证明匹配的通过/阻断策略边界对稳定策略适应至关重要。
AI.motivation: 现有图像护栏通常将安全性视为图像的固有属性，在固定安全策略下训练和评估，但实际部署中同一图像在不同产品或策略变更时可能面临不同的合规判断。这种策略自适应的需求与现有方法依赖图像级安全先验之间存在显著差距，亟需研究能够根据动态提供的策略进行泛化判断的护栏模型。
AI.method: 本文提出PolicyShiftGuard，采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段为随机化策略监督微调（RP-SFT），第二阶段为边界对策略适应（BP-Adapt）。BP-Adapt针对同一图像和风险类别构造匹配的通过/阻断提示对，结合标准标签监督和成对对比损失，使模型学会区分阻断策略与通过策略。同时构建了包含2,000个策略判别实例的PolicyShiftBench基准，覆盖265张图像，每张图像平均配7.55个策略条件提示。
AI.result: 实验表明现有VLMs和专用护栏在策略偏移下表现脆弱，而PolicyShiftGuard显著提升了策略敏感性能。7B模型在PolicyShiftBench上达到76.9平均F1和72.1平均PSS的SOTA性能，并良好迁移至UnSafeBench和SafeEditBench。消融实验证实匹配的通过/阻断边界对是稳定策略适应的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了图像安全检测中策略自适应问题的重要性，证明通过构造策略边界对进行对比学习可以有效解耦图像内容与策略规则。PolicyShiftGuard在保持低延迟的同时实现了优异的性能权衡，为动态安全策略环境下的图像护栏部署提供了实用方案，也为后续研究建立了标准化的评估基准。

title: StateFuse: Deterministic Conflict-Preserving Memory for Multi-Agent Systems
comment: Code and supplementary materials available at: https://github.com/nZiben/statefuse
summary:
Agent systems accumulate conflicting observations across branches, retries, and replicas, yet many practical memory layers still collapse disagreement behind overwrite rules that are difficult to inspect or correct. We present StateFuse, a conflict-aware replicated memory contract built on standard OpSet/CRDT merge. StateFuse does not introduce a new join algebra; it defines an agent-facing semantics layer with immutable history, explicit conflict objects, exact and semantic correction handles (claim_id / claim_ref), deterministic predicate contracts, and projection-time resolution that cannot rewrite replicated state.
  We evaluate StateFuse against flat multi-value, raw-log, provenance-style, and collapsed baselines under matched resolver and verification policies. On a 282-question official conflict-bearing MemoryAgentBench slice, the compared methods tie on answer accuracy, but conflict-preserving surfaces keep contradictions visible while collapsed surfaces do not. In a controlled agent loop with uniform verification, preserving ambiguity enables safer abstention and correction than early collapse. A correction-handle ablation further shows that semantic handles matter when exact prior identifiers are unavailable.
  The resulting claim is narrow: StateFuse is best supported as a safer public memory contract for contradiction surfacing, abstention, and auditable correction, not as a universal accuracy gain.

AI.tldr: StateFuse 是一个基于 OpSet/CRDT 的冲突感知记忆合约，通过不可变历史、显式冲突对象、语义修正句柄和投影时解析机制，为智能体系统提供矛盾可见、可审计修正的安全公共记忆层，在不牺牲答案准确性的前提下支持更安全的弃权和修正。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体系统中的记忆层在面对跨分支、重试和副本间积累的冲突观测时，常采用难以检查或修正的覆写规则来消除分歧，导致矛盾信息被隐式丢弃，缺乏可审计的冲突处理与修正机制。
AI.method: StateFuse 在标准 OpSet/CRDT 合并协议之上构建冲突感知记忆合约，不引入新的联合代数，而是定义了一个智能体面向的语义层，包括不可变历史、显式冲突对象、精确（claim_id）和语义（claim_ref）两种修正句柄、确定性谓词合约以及投影时解析机制，该解析不会重写已复制的状态。
AI.result: 在包含 282 个问题的官方冲突型 MemoryAgentBench 子集上，StateFuse 与多种基线在答案准确性上持平，但冲突保留表面能保持矛盾可见而折叠表面则不能；在带有统一验证的受控智能体循环中，保留歧义比早期折叠实现了更安全的弃权和修正；修正句柄消融实验表明，当精确先验标识符不可用时，语义句柄至关重要。
AI.conclusion: StateFuse 的最佳定位是作为更安全的公共记忆合约，专注于矛盾的显式展示、安全弃权和可审计修正，而非通用的准确性提升工具。

title: Unlearnable Faces: Privacy Protection Surviving Extraction Pipeline
summary: Unlearnable examples keep publicly shared photos from being learned by unauthorized face-recognition models. An imperceptible perturbation, added before sharing, makes any model trained on the protected photos fail on clean faces. The perturbation is crafted on the shared image, however the attacker trains on the face it extracts, cropped and resized to the recognizer input, and under this extraction the protection collapses. We propose LPID, which builds the extraction into the unlearnable-example objective. LPID confines the perturbation to the extracted face region and optimizes it through a differentiable model of the extraction, concentrating its energy in the frequency band the extraction preserves. Because this robustness is a property of the transform rather than of any identity, LPID is re-optimized per album and protects even users it has never seen. LPID attains the lowest attacker accuracy of all methods in every setting we evaluate, holding the attacker below $10\%$ under crop+resize extraction on identities unseen at protection time, while remaining imperceptible at $32.7$\,dB PSNR and $0.161$ LPIPS.

AI.tldr: 提出LPID方法，通过将提取过程建模为可微分操作并嵌入不可学习示例目标函数中，使得添加的扰动在经人脸裁剪缩放后仍能有效破坏模型训练，在所有设置下将攻击者准确率降至10%以下。
AI.motivation: 现有的不可学习示例方法在共享图像上添加扰动，但攻击者实际训练时会对图像进行人脸提取（裁剪和缩放），导致保护失效，现有方法缺乏对这种提取过程的鲁棒性。
AI.method: LPID将人脸提取过程（裁剪+缩放）建模为可微分变换并嵌入不可学习示例的优化目标中，将扰动限制在人脸区域，通过可微分的提取模型进行优化，使扰动能量集中在提取过程保留的频带上；该方法作为变换的属性而非特定身份，每张相册重新优化一次即可保护未见过的用户。
AI.result: 在所有评估设置中LPID均取得最低的攻击者准确率，在保护时未见过的身份上经裁剪+缩放提取后攻击者准确率低于10%，同时PSNR为32.7 dB，LPIPS为0.161，保持人眼不可感知。
AI.conclusion: LPID通过将提取过程纳入优化目标，有效解决了不可学习示例在实际人脸识别场景中因预处理而失效的问题，证明了面向变换的鲁棒性设计比面向身份的鲁棒性设计更具泛化能力。

title: PCBWorld: A Benchmark Environment for Engine-Grounded PCB Design Automation
comment: Accepted to the KDD 2026 Workshop on Evaluation and Trustworthiness of Agentic AI (non-archival). Main text with appendix
summary: PCB routing is the task of connecting the nets of a board with copper traces under strict design rules, yet learning-based methods still lag behind rule-based routers. We introduce PCBWorld, an open-source engine-grounded PCB routing environment built on the KiCad EDA engine. As a human engineer does, agents in PCBWorld interactively route a board through the engine's native operations, using its Design Rule Check (DRC) feedback to keep the routing within the design rules. The environment supports both RL policies and tool-using LLM agents. Alongside the environment, PCBWorld-Bench provides three dataset families in KiCad's native board format (.kicad_pcb), covering two types of controllable synthetic instances and 679 real open-source boards. It scores any completed board with eight engine-checked evaluation metrics, regardless of the routing method. In our experiments, agents in PCBWorld consistently outperformed grid-action RL policies and open-loop LLM baselines, and an RL policy trained only on synthetic boards transferred zero-shot to real boards, approaching rule-based routers. These results position the engine-grounded, interactive approach of PCBWorld as a promising foundation for advancing the routing ability of both RL and LLM agents.

AI.tldr: PCBWorld 是一个基于 KiCad EDA 引擎构建的开源 PCB 布线环境，支持强化学习策略和工具使用型 LLM 智能体通过引擎原生操作和 DRC 反馈交互式布线；实验表明其智能体一致优于网格动作 RL 和开环 LLM 基线，且仅在合成板上训练的 RL 策略可零样本迁移至真实板，接近基于规则的布线器。
AI.motivation: PCB 布线任务需要在严格设计规则下用铜迹线连接电路板上的网络，但当前基于学习的方法在性能上仍落后于基于规则的布线器，现有环境缺乏对引擎级交互和设计规则检查反馈的原生支持。
AI.method: PCBWorld 基于 KiCad EDA 引擎构建，智能体通过引擎原生操作交互式布线，并利用引擎的设计规则检查（DRC）反馈确保布线符合规范；环境同时支持 RL 策略和工具使用型 LLM 智能体。配套的 PCBWorld-Bench 提供三个数据集系列（含可控合成实例和 679 块真实开源板），并使用八项引擎检查的评估指标对任意布线方法完成的板进行评分。
AI.result: 在 PCBWorld 中的智能体一致优于基于网格动作的 RL 策略和开环 LLM 基线；仅在合成板上训练的 RL 策略能够零样本迁移到真实板上，性能接近基于规则的布线器。
AI.conclusion: PCBWorld 这种基于引擎接地、交互式的布线方法为提升 RL 和 LLM 智能体的布线能力提供了有前景的基础，表明引擎原生交互和 DRC 反馈是推动学习方法追赶规则布线器的关键方向。

title: Structured Data Extraction from Real Estate Documents using Clustering, Classification, and Large Language Models
summary: Real estate property listings expose structured metadata through the API. Still, the richest property-level information (i.e., legal status, structural condition, utility supplies, heating systems) sits in attached questionnaire documents that no automated system currently processes at scale. These documents are heterogeneous. Some are digitally generated with selectable text, others are scanned physical forms. There are even more complex layouts that contain checkbox annotations that defeat conventional text extraction. In this paper, we present an end-to-end pipeline for acquiring, classifying, and extracting structured data from selectable text documents. The pipeline was applied to 3965 questionnaire documents collected from a live property platform via reverse-engineered REST APIs. First, we classified each document into one of three structural categories (text_only, scanned, and special_char), then extracted 35 predefined property attributes from eligible documents using DeepSeek R1 as the Large Language Model, prompted to return a structured JSON object. All 2781 submitted documents were processed successfully, producing a final dataset of 2766 unique property records. Downstream validation confirmed the data quality. Cosine similarity matching achieves a Jaccard consistency score of 0.82, and K-Means clustering produces interpretable market segments with a silhouette score of 0.2088. Results show that the proposed extraction from each property document is both feasible and reliable at this scale.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端流水线，用于从房产问卷文档中自动获取、分类和提取结构化数据，利用DeepSeek R1大语言模型从2781份文档中成功提取了35个属性，并通过下游验证确认了提取的可行性与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 房产列表中最丰富的物业信息（如法律状态、结构状况、公用设施等）存在于问卷文档中，这些文档格式异构，包括数字生成文本、扫描件及带有复选框注解的复杂布局，现有自动系统无法大规模处理这类文档。
AI.method: 构建了一个端到端流水线，首先通过反向工程REST API从实时房产平台收集3965份问卷文档，然后将其分类为text_only、scanned和special_char三种结构类别，最后使用DeepSeek R1大语言模型对符合条件的文档进行结构化JSON提取，获取35个预定义的物业属性。
AI.result: 全部2781份提交文档均成功处理，得到2766条唯一物业记录；余弦相似度匹配的Jaccard一致性得分为0.82，K-Means聚类产生可解释的市场细分，轮廓系数为0.2088。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的从物业文档中提取结构化数据的方法在中等规模上是可行且可靠的，能够有效处理异构文档格式，并对下游市场分析和数据质量验证具有实际意义。

title: Information Limits and Attractor Dynamics in Economies of Frontier LLM Agents: A Pre-Registered Test
comment: 15 pages. Preprint. Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21185866. Companion synthesis: arXiv:2606.12502
summary:
We report a pre-registered, two-part experiment on small economies of frontier language-model agents (Claude Opus 4.8), testing two quantitative predictions about coupled multi-agent systems: an information-theoretic capacity region for wealth growth under market coupling, and a mean-field residual-scaling law for population misalignment under incentive and control levers. All predictions, acceptance bands, and decision rules were frozen in a public git chain before any run; every reported number re-derives mechanically from cached model outputs; the entire experiment cost $138.76 in metered API spend and is re-runnable at zero cost from the cache.
  Result 1 (confirmation): in parimutuel-coupled economies, relative growth equals relative claimed information -- the gap law G_a - G_b = I_a - I_b holds to a worst-case 46 millinats (pre-registered band: 50) across four perception structures; coalition value is submodular exactly where channels are conditionally independent, and a designed XOR synergy control flips it supermodular by 0.62 >= ln2/2 nats, with agents reasoning out the joint bit; the joint growth ceiling G_S <= H(X) binds exactly; and the best-informed agent absorbs essentially the whole wealth pool in 4/5 market seeds.
  Result 2 (structural negative): the residual-scaling test returned "domain not found." In all 72 population runs, goal dispersion collapsed (V -> 0; maximum 4.85 against a frozen floor of 5.31), the population's response to the two levers was a step function across the dominance boundary rather than a smooth response, and cells near the boundary were bistable with seed-selected outcomes. No tested LLM population at any capability level realizes the noise-maintained-dispersion regime the smooth mean-field model assumes. We release the full protocol, pre-registration chain, call cache, and analysis code.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过预注册实验验证了前沿语言模型智能体（Claude Opus 4.8）在耦合多智能体系统中的两个定量预测：信息论容量区域下的财富增长差距定律（确认）和均场残差标度律（被否定），发现智能体在耦合市场中遵循信息增长差距定律，但所有LLM种群均未实现均场模型假设的噪声维持分散状态。
AI.motivation: 当前对前沿语言模型智能体在多智能体系统中的定量理论预测验证极为匮乏，尤其是在耦合市场中的财富增长信息论界限以及种群激励对齐的统计力学规律方面缺乏预先注册的、可复现的实验证据。
AI.method: 论文采用预注册实验设计，在Claude Opus 4.8智能体上构建parimutuel耦合经济系统，测试两个定量预测：信息论容量区域下的财富增长差距定律（G_a - G_b = I_a - I_b）和种群失配的均场残差标度律；所有预测、接受带和决策规则在运行前冻结于公开git链，实验完全基于缓存模型输出机械推导，总API成本$138.76。
AI.result: 结果一确认了增长差距定律：G_a - G_b = I_a - I_b在四种感知结构下最坏偏差46毫纳特（预注册带50），联合增长上限G_S <= H(X)精确成立，XOR协同控制使联盟价值由子模翻转为超模（0.62 >= ln2/2 nats）；结果二为结构性否定：所有72个种群的目标准则方差V降至最大4.85（预注册下限5.31），种群对杠杆的响应呈跨优势边界的阶跃函数而非平滑响应，边界附近细胞呈双稳态且结果由种子选择决定，未发现任何LLM种群实现噪声维持分散状态。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明前沿语言模型智能体在耦合市场中严格遵循信息论增长定律，但其种群行为偏离均场统计力学假设，揭示了现有多智能体LLM系统在激励响应上呈现离散而非连续特质，为构建可预测的多智能体经济系统提供了定量边界和负向证据。

title: MSA-DCNN: A Data-Efficient Multi-Scale Deformable CNN for Medical Image Classification
summary: Existing deep learning methods perform well in medical image classification but struggle with multi-scale morphology and limited annotations due to fixed sampling and data-hungry training. Existing approaches address these challenges in isolation: DCN-based models provide adaptive sampling but lack explicit multi-scale attention fusion and label-efficient regularisation; multi-scale architectures typically rely on static fusion; and semi-supervised methods target label scarcity without jointly modelling adaptive cross-scale representations. We propose MSA-DCNN, a scale-consistent deformable attention learning framework that introduces adaptive multi-scale sampling, within-scale saliency refinement, learned cross-scale fusion, and auxiliary self-distillation within a unified optimisation scheme, with potential to generalise to structurally heterogeneous anatomy. We evaluate on three public benchmarks and an external hold-out set for leukaemia. MSA-DCNN demonstrates competitive and often better performance against ViT baselines, CNN baselines, and a MICCAI semi-supervised baseline under distribution shift and label scarcity in accuracy, F1, and AUC (binary), while using fewer parameters. Ablations confirm complementary component contributions, supporting MSA-DCNN as a practical foundation for data-efficient medical image classification.

AI.tldr: MSA-DCNN是一个统一的尺度一致可变形注意力学习框架，通过自适应多尺度采样、尺度内显著性精炼、可学习跨尺度融合和辅助自蒸馏，在参数更少的情况下，在分布偏移和标签稀缺场景下达到优于ViT、CNN和半监督基线的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在医学图像分类中难以同时处理多尺度形态和有限标注问题：DCN模型提供自适应采样但缺乏显式多尺度注意力融合和标签高效正则化；多尺度架构通常依赖静态融合；半监督方法仅针对标签稀缺而未能联合建模自适应跨尺度表示，缺乏统一解决上述挑战的框架。
AI.method: MSA-DCNN提出了一个统一的尺度一致可变形注意力学习框架，包含四个核心组件：自适应多尺度采样实现可变形感受野、尺度内显著性精炼增强关键区域响应、可学习跨尺度融合动态整合多尺度信息、以及辅助自蒸馏提供标签高效的正则化约束，所有组件在统一优化方案下联合训练。
AI.result: 在三个公开基准和一个外部白血病保留集上，MSA-DCNN在分布偏移和标签稀缺条件下，在准确率、F1和AUC（二分类）指标上展现出优于或媲美ViT基线、CNN基线和MICCAI半监督基线的性能，同时使用更少的参数。消融实验证实各组件具有互补贡献。
AI.conclusion: MSA-DCNN通过统一框架联合解决自适应多尺度采样与标签稀缺问题，为数据高效的医学图像分类提供了实用基础，具备推广到结构异质性解剖区域的潜力。

title: PolyWorkBench: Benchmarking Multilingual Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have shown strong performance in long-horizon tasks that require planning, tool use, and interaction with external environments. However, most existing benchmarks implicitly assume a monolingual setting, where the entire execution process, including reasoning, tool invocation, and output generation, is conducted within a single language. In contrast, real-world applications often involve multilingual inputs and outputs within a unified workflow, yet the interaction between multilinguality and agentic execution remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce PolyWorkBench, a benchmark for evaluating LLM agents on multilingual long-horizon workplace workflows. PolyWorkBench consists of 67 tasks across five domains, including commerce, knowledge work, legal analysis, localization, and manufacturing, where agents must process heterogeneous multilingual inputs, perform iterative reasoning, invoke external tools, and produce structured outputs. To enable comprehensive evaluation, we propose a hybrid framework that combines structural grading, executable verification, and LLM-based semantic assessment. This design allows us to capture both functional correctness and linguistic consistency across complex workflows. Empirical results show that state-of-the-art LLM agents suffer significant performance degradation in multilingual workflow settings compared to monolingual counterparts. Our analysis suggests that multilinguality introduces compounding effects across reasoning and execution steps, highlighting the importance of jointly modeling language variation and procedural decision-making in agent evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出PolyWorkBench基准测试，用于评估多语言长周期工作流中的LLM智能体，发现现有智能体在多语言场景下性能显著下降，表明语言变异与过程决策的联合建模至关重要。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体基准测试默认假设单语言执行环境，而真实场景往往涉及多语言输入输出与统一工作流，但多语言性与智能体执行之间的交互机制尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 构建PolyWorkBench基准测试，包含67个跨五个领域（商业、知识工作、法律分析、本地化、制造）的多语言长周期工作流任务；提出结合结构评分、可执行验证和基于LLM的语义评估的混合评估框架。
AI.result: 最先进的LLM智能体在多语言工作流场景下相比单语言场景出现显著的性能下降；多语言性在推理和执行步骤中引入复合效应，导致整体任务完成度降低。
AI.conclusion: 多语言性对智能体执行产生复合负面影响，揭示了语言变异与程序化决策联合建模的重要性，为未来多语言智能体系统的评估与设计提供了方向。

title: WebRetriever: A Large-Scale Comprehensive Benchmark for Efficient Web Agent Evaluation
summary: As web agents increasingly demonstrate capabilities in automated task execution, the development of robust evaluation frameworks for assessing their navigation and task completion performance has emerged as a critical research priority. However, existing benchmarks exhibit fundamental limitations. First, they suffer from insufficient scale and limited domain diversity, constraining comprehensive evaluation of cross-domain generalization. Second, prevailing LLM-as-Judge evaluation methodologies inadequately capture fine-grained interaction semantics, particularly regarding precise query formulation and filtering operations. Third, current benchmarks predominantly emphasize navigation success metrics while neglecting critical requirements for real-world deployment scenarios. To address these limitations, we introduce WebRetriever, a large-scale benchmark encompassing 800 websites and 1,550 tasks across diverse domains, including consumer, professional, and enterprise sectors, with comprehensive coverage of user intent patterns. We propose NavEval (Navigation Evaluation), a novel LLM-as-Judge framework that leverages rich interaction context beyond visual screenshots, achieving state-of-the-art alignment with human judgment across multiple evaluation datasets. Furthermore, we establish three complementary evaluation protocols that collectively provide holistic assessment of web agent capabilities: navigation proficiency, knowledge-assisted interaction, and end-to-end task completion with information extraction. Extensive experimental analysis reveals substantial performance disparities across evaluation protocols, demonstrating that navigation success alone is an insufficient predictor of real-world application effectiveness. WebRetriever delivers fine-grained diagnostic insights into agent capabilities and establishes a rigorous foundation for advancing web agent research and development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WebRetriever，一个覆盖800个网站和1550个任务的跨域基准测试，以及NavEval，一种利用丰富交互上下文超越视觉截图的新型LLM-as-Judge评估框架，并建立三种互补评估协议，揭示导航成功不能充分预测真实部署效能。
AI.motivation: 现有Web智能体基准存在三个关键局限：规模不足且领域多样性有限，难以评估跨域泛化能力；主流的LLM-as-Judge评估方法无法捕捉细粒度交互语义，尤其在精确查询构造和过滤操作方面；当前基准过度侧重导航成功指标，忽视了真实部署场景对信息提取和端到端任务完成等能力的关键需求。
AI.method: 提出WebRetriever大规模基准，涵盖800个网站和1550个任务，覆盖消费、专业和企业等多元领域及完整用户意图模式。提出NavEval框架，利用超越视觉截图的丰富交互上下文（如查询语义与过滤操作）进行LLM-as-Judge评估。建立三种互补评估协议：导航熟练度、知识辅助交互、以及带信息提取的端到端任务完成。
AI.result: NavEval在多个评估数据集上实现与人类判断的最先进对齐，显著优于基于视觉截图的传统方法。广泛实验分析揭示不同评估协议下智能体性能存在显著差异，证明导航成功本身是真实应用效果的不充分预测指标，WebRetriever提供了细粒度的智能体能力诊断。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明现有以导航为中心的评估范式存在根本性缺陷，真实部署需要涵盖语义理解、知识辅助和信息提取等多维度能力评估。WebRetriever为Web智能体研究建立了更严格的评估基础，其细粒度诊断能力有助于指导更鲁棒、更实用的智能体系统开发。

title: Reward-Density Heuristic for Dynamic Multi-Vehicle Routing: Performance and Computational Efficiency
summary: The Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) and its variants represent some of the most practically consequential optimization challenges in modern logistics and urban mobility. In this study, we address a dynamic, online variant combining elements of the VRP and the Orienteering Problem (OP), in which a fleet of vehicles must maximise cumulative reward collected within a fixed time horizon while continuously replanning as new tasks arrive. We propose and evaluate a reward-density heuristic for dynamic multi-vehicle assignment, referred to as the Efficiency heuristic. We evaluate this formulation across two application domains: autonomous drone task allocation and urban taxi dispatch, across multiple fleet sizes and task scales. The proposed method is compared with four classical construction heuristics and three metaheuristic algorithms (Adaptive Large Neighbourhood Search, Genetic Algorithm, and Simulated Annealing), all evaluated under identical conditions. Across all tested configurations, the Efficiency heuristic matches the solution quality of the best metaheuristic algorithms while requiring two to three orders of magnitude less planning time, establishing Pareto dominance over all competing methods on the reward-versus-compute frontier. These findings suggest a practical design principle for real-time allocation and dispatch systems: in dynamic, time-constrained routing environments, carefully designed greedy heuristics can match the output of sophisticated search procedures at a fraction of the computational cost, making them preferable for online deployment.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于奖励密度的Efficiency启发式算法，用于解决动态在线车辆路径与定向问题。实验表明，该方法在解质量上匹配最优元启发式算法，但计算时间减少了2-3个数量级，在奖励-计算前沿上实现帕累托支配，适用于无人机任务分配和城市出租车调度等实时场景。
AI.motivation: 车辆路径问题及其变体是现代物流与城市移动中关键但具有挑战性的优化问题，动态在线版本需要在固定时间窗内持续重规划以最大化累积奖励。现有元启发式算法虽解质量高但计算开销大，难以满足实时部署需求，而简单启发式往往牺牲解质量，因此存在在动态、时间受限环境中兼顾效率与解质量的算法设计空白。
AI.method: 论文提出一种称为Efficiency启发式的奖励密度方法，用于动态多车辆任务分配，问题形式结合了VRP与定向问题（Orienteering Problem）的特点。该方法在两个应用领域（自主无人机任务分配与城市出租车调度）中，与四种经典构造启发式和三种元启发式算法（自适应大邻域搜索、遗传算法、模拟退火）在同一条件下进行对比评估，涵盖多种车队规模和任务规模。
AI.result: 在所有测试配置下，Efficiency启发式在解质量上与最优元启发式算法相当，但规划时间减少了2-3个数量级，在奖励-计算前沿上对所有竞争方法实现了帕累托支配。该发现在无人机任务分配和城市出租车调度两个应用域中均保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，在动态、时间受限的路径规划环境中，精心设计的贪心启发式能够在极低计算成本下匹配复杂搜索程序的输出质量，这一设计原则使得此类方法成为在线部署的更优选择。工作为实时分配与调度系统的实际设计提供了指导性见解。

title: AEGIS: A Mechanism-Guided Defense against Visual Synonym Jailbreaks in Text-to-Image Models
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models have achieved high visual fidelity and broad adoption, but remain vulnerable to safety violations when adversaries exploit them to synthesize illicit content. Existing alignment paradigms, from input sanitization to structural feature pruning, are largely organized around unsafe concepts explicitly exposed during filtering, editing, or localization. This leaves a blind spot for visual synonym attacks (VSA), a jailbreak where benign-looking prompts elicit prohibited imagery through implicit visual associations. As a result, current defenses face a safety-utility dilemma: they may either under-mitigate VSA threats or over-suppress visually similar benign concepts. The core challenge is that VSA hides the unsafe target at the textual surface while revealing it through generation-time visual-semantic convergence. In this work, we therefore shift from static suppression of pre-specified unsafe concepts to dynamic tracing of how unsafe semantics emerge during generation. Our mechanistic analysis shows that VSA and explicit unsafe prompts converge through sparse semantic-injecting attention heads, which serve as inference-time bottlenecks for prohibited visual semantics. Based on this insight, we propose AEGIS (Adaptive Evasion Guard via Identification and Steering), an inference-time defense that applies similarity-aware repulsion only at the identified vulnerable heads. Evaluated against 16 baselines, AEGIS improves both safety and utility. On SD 1.4, it reduces ASR to $\mathbf{0.00}/\mathbf{0.03}$ for in-domain violence/nudity VSA and achieves ASRs $\le \mathbf{0.09}$ on out-of-domain explicit and adversarial attacks. It preserves benign fidelity, avoids suppressing hard-negative concepts, and transfers to SD 2.1 and FLUX.1 after re-identifying the critical heads for each backbone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AEGIS，一种基于推理时注意力头动态追踪与语义排斥的防御方法，用于对抗文本到图像扩散模型中的视觉同义词攻击（VSA），在保持安全性与实用性方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐防御机制（如输入过滤、结构特征剪枝）均围绕显式不安全概念设计，无法应对视觉同义词攻击（VSA），即通过看似无害的提示词隐含地生成违禁图像。核心挑战在于VSA在文本层面隐藏不安全目标，仅在生成过程中通过视觉-语义收敛暴露出来，导致现有防御面临安全性与实用性之间的两难困境。
AI.method: 本文提出AEGIS（自适应规避守卫），基于机制性分析发现VSA与显式不安全提示通过稀疏的语义注入注意力头（semantic-injecting attention heads）在推理时收敛，这些注意力头充当禁止视觉语义的推理时瓶颈。AEGIS是一种推理时防御方法，仅在识别出的脆弱注意力头上应用相似性感知排斥（similarity-aware repulsion），从而动态追踪不安全语义的涌现过程而非静态抑制预设概念。
AI.result: 在SD 1.4上，AEGIS将领域内暴力/色情VSA的攻击成功率（ASR）降至0.00/0.03，在领域外显式和对抗性攻击上的ASR不超过0.09。该方法保持良性样本保真度，避免抑制硬负样本概念，并可迁移至SD 2.1和FLUX.1（需为每个主干网络重新识别关键注意力头）。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过从静态概念抑制转向动态生成时语义追踪，揭示了VSA攻击的机制性本质，并证明通过在稀疏的关键注意力头进行精准干预，可以有效解决安全性与实用性的权衡问题，为扩散模型的防御设计提供了新的范式。

title: Danus: Orchestrating Mathematical Reasoning Agents with Fact-Graph Memory
summary: Recent LLM-based mathematical reasoning agents have begun to tackle research-level problems and, in several cases, have contributed to the resolution of open problems. However, scaling and orchestrating such agents effectively remains challenging, due to the difficulty of coordinating parallel proof search while keeping intermediate claims organized and reliable. In this paper, we propose Danus, an orchestration system for research-level mathematical reasoning centered on a shared fact graph as a global memory-management mechanism. Danus consists of a main agent that performs planning and coordination, multiple worker agents that carry out proof search in parallel, and a stateless verifier that checks proposed mathematical claims before they are admitted into the fact graph. Each verified fact is stored together with its proof and logical dependencies, allowing the system to build long arguments incrementally while keeping the shared proof state organized. The main agent periodically summarizes the evolving proof state, redirects workers across promising directions, and supports interaction with human mathematicians through progress reports. We evaluate Danus through six research-level case studies in algebraic geometry, singularity theory, and combinatorics, illustrating how the fact-graph memory mechanism enables Danus to construct long, detailed mathematical proofs. Our results suggest that fact-graph-based orchestration provides an effective route toward scaling mathematical reasoning agents for long-horizon research problems. Danus is open source at https://github.com/frenzymath/Danus.

AI.tldr: Danus 提出基于事实图（fact graph）作为全局内存管理的编排系统，通过主智能体规划协调、多个工作智能体并行证明搜索、无状态验证器检查数学主张，从而支持研究级数学推理的长程证明构建。在代数几何、奇点理论和组合数学的六个案例中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的数学推理智能体在解决研究级开放问题时面临扩展和编排困难，具体难点在于并行证明搜索的协调以及中间声明的组织和可靠性维护缺乏有效机制。
AI.method: Danus 提出了以共享事实图为核心全局内存管理的编排系统，包含三个组件：一个主智能体负责规划和协调、多个工作智能体并行执行证明搜索、一个无状态验证器在数学主张被加入事实图之前进行正确性检查。每个被验证的事实连同其证明和逻辑依赖一同存储，主智能体定期总结演化中的证明状态并重定向工作智能体到有前景的方向，同时支持通过进度报告与人类数学家交互。
AI.result: 在代数几何、奇点理论和组合数学领域的六个研究级案例研究中进行了评估，结果表明基于事实图的内存管理机制使Danus能够构建长而详细的数学证明，展示了该编排方法在长时域研究问题上的扩展能力。
AI.conclusion: 事实图驱动的编排机制为解决长时域研究级数学推理问题提供了一种有效的扩展途径，Danus作为一个开源系统为未来数学推理智能体的设计和部署提供了可行的架构参考。

title: A toy framework for single and multi-agent human-AI curiosity ecosystems
summary: This paper offers a toy framework for considering curiosity as an ecosystem. First, it suggests that a single agent's inquiry policy (how, when, and why an agent asks a question) depends on how the agent values immediate uncertainty reduction, costs, delayed return, and the value of keeping the question open. A key concept in the framework is that the weights on these decision-related terms can change with experience. For example, a period of cheap, quickly answered questions may change the cost of inquiry on a short timescale and change which kinds of questions the agent is drawn to answer over a longer timescale. Second, these ideas are extended to many agents exploring a shared knowledge landscape, and there the framework tracks inquiry volume, topic diversity, frontier-directed inquiry, redundancy, and reusable knowledge. The result is a conceptual toy framework for studying curiosity ecology and for future efforts towards designing multi-agent AI systems for discovery. It serves as a companion piece for a paper currently under review in Trends in Neurosciences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个概念性的"好奇心生态系统"框架，将单个智能体的好奇心建模为依赖不确定性减少、成本、延迟回报和问题开放性保留的加权决策过程，并扩展至多智能体共享知识空间中的好奇心生态学研究。
AI.motivation: 现有好奇心研究多聚焦于单一智能体的内在动机机制，缺乏对好奇心如何在个体经验动态变化以及多智能体知识共享环境中演化与交互的系统性理解，论文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 提出了一个概念性框架，将智能体的探究策略建模为对即时不确定性减少、成本、延迟回报和保持问题开放价值四个决策项的加权权衡，且权重可随经验动态调整；进一步将框架扩展至多智能体场景，通过探究量、主题多样性、前沿导向探究、冗余度和可重用知识等指标刻画知识景观中的好奇心生态。
AI.result: 论文本身是一个概念性框架，未提供具体的实验或量化结果；其核心产出是描述好奇心生态系统的理论工具，包括单智能体层面决策权重的经验依赖性（如廉价快速问答改变短期成本感知和长期问题偏好）以及多智能体层面知识探索的结构化度量指标。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究好奇心生态学提供了概念基础，并为未来设计面向科学发现的多智能体AI系统提供了理论指导，可作为神经科学领域相关论文的配套理论工具。

title: High-Resolution Artwork Outpainting with Global Blueprint Guidance and Layout Control
summary: Image outpainting extends an image beyond its original borders, requiring seamless style integration and globally coherent scene completion. Building on the success of diffusion models, recent methods have achieved substantial improvements in visual quality. In practice, however, high-resolution outpainting is commonly performed via progressive expansion around a fixed source image, particularly in artwork scenarios. Despite this progress, existing approaches still suffer from three key limitations: (i) the absence of a reliable global planning mechanism, which leads to structural instability and error accumulation at high resolutions; (ii) limited spatial controllability beyond text prompts, making it difficult to place objects at user-specified locations; and (iii) high inference latency caused by inherently sequential patch generation. To address these issues, we propose a global blueprint-guided two-stage diffusion framework for layout-controllable high-resolution outpainting with efficient parallel synthesis. In Stage 1, we generate a low-resolution global blueprint using a layout adapter that injects bounding-box conditions into a Stable Diffusion inpainting backbone, producing a globally consistent structural plan while extracting global guidance features. In Stage 2, we synthesize high-resolution local patches in parallel by injecting the blueprint-derived global guidance and initializing each patch from the blueprint using the low-frequency preservation property of forward diffusion. This design eliminates sequential dependency while maintaining global coherence. Extensive experiments on large-scale artwork datasets demonstrate improved visual fidelity, stronger semantic consistency, and substantially reduced inference time compared to prior baselines, while uniquely supporting explicit layout control for artwork outpainting.

AI.tldr: 提出一种全局蓝图引导的两阶段扩散框架，用于布局可控的高分辨率图像外扩，通过低分辨率蓝图生成与并行局部合成，同时解决结构不稳定、空间可控性差和推理延迟高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有高分辨率图像外扩方法存在三个关键局限：缺乏可靠的全局规划机制导致高分辨率下的结构不稳定和误差累积；空间可控性局限于文本提示，难以在指定位置放置物体；顺序式补丁生成导致推理延迟高。本文旨在同时解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出一个全局蓝图引导的两阶段扩散框架。第一阶段利用布局适配器将边界框条件注入Stable Diffusion修补主干，生成低分辨率全局蓝图并提取全局引导特征；第二阶段通过注入蓝图导出的全局引导，并利用前向扩散的低频保持特性从蓝图初始化每个补丁，实现高分辨率局部补丁的并行合成，消除顺序依赖同时保持全局一致性。
AI.result: 在大规模艺术数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法相比现有基线在视觉保真度、语义一致性方面有显著提升，推理时间大幅减少，并且独特地支持显式布局控制。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了通过全局蓝图引导与并行合成策略，可以在保持全局连贯性的同时大幅提升高分辨率图像外扩的效率与可控性，为艺术场景下的布局可控外扩提供了有效方案。

title: Information Gain-based Rollout Policy Optimization: An Adaptive Tree-Structured Rollout Approach for Multi-Turn LLM Agents
summary: Reinforcement learning has become a promising paradigm for improving large language model (LLM) agents on long-horizon search tasks, where the agent must make a sequence of intermediate decisions before receiving a final outcome. However, existing methods still face a key limitation: the rollout budget is often allocated without explicitly assessing the utility of intermediate states. As a result, substantial computation may be spent on low-value states, even though different branches can vary drastically in their informativeness. In this paper, we propose Information Gain-based Rollout Policy Optimization (IGRPO), a policy optimization framework that treats intermediate-state informativeness as the organizing principle of rollout collection. Specifically, IGRPO performs budget-aware tree-structured rollouts by allocating expansion budget according to node-level informativeness, so that more informative branches are expanded more frequently while unpromising branches are progressively suppressed. We further demonstrate that the information gain-based rollout induces an explicit limiting teacher distribution over trajectories, which naturally yields a clear policy optimization target, thereby unifying adaptive tree-structured exploration with principled policy learning under a single framework. Experiments on seven challenging search-augmented QA benchmarks demonstrate that IGRPO consistently outperforms strong baselines under the same rollout budget constraints, validating the effectiveness of leveraging the induced teacher distribution to guide policy optimization for long-horizon search agents.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于信息增益的 rollout 策略优化框架 IGRPO，通过在树结构搜索中按节点信息增益分配扩展预算，将自适应树结构探索与原则性策略学习统一，在七个长程搜索 QA 基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在优化长程搜索任务的 LLM 智能体时，rollout 预算的分配缺乏对中间状态实用性的显式评估，导致大量计算浪费在低价值分支上，而不同分支的信息量可能存在巨大差异。
AI.method: 提出 IGRPO 框架，以中间状态的信息增益作为 rollout 收集的组织原则，执行预算感知的树结构 rollout，根据节点级信息增益分配扩展预算，信息量更大的分支更频繁扩展，无望分支逐步抑制；信息增益 rollout 诱导出显式的限制性教师分布，该分布自然地提供清晰的策略优化目标，从而将自适应树结构探索与原则性策略学习统一在同一框架下。
AI.result: 在七个具有挑战性的搜索增强 QA 基准上，IGRPO 在相同 rollout 预算约束下持续优于强基线方法，验证了利用诱导出的教师分布指导长程搜索智能体策略优化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过信息增益驱动的预算分配和诱导教师分布，IGRPO 有效解决了长程搜索任务中 rollout 预算浪费问题，为将探索效率与策略学习深度融合提供了新的统一范式。

title: Structured-Condensed Prompt Tuning in Vision-Language Models for Fine-grained Image Recognition
summary: Fine-grained image recognition poses a significant challenge due to the substantial expertise and effort required for manual annotation. Vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP provide a compelling zero-shot alternative, reducing reliance on extensive labeled data. However, their ability to capture subtle distinctions remains limited, leading to subpar recognition performance. While prompt tuning has proven effective for adapting VLMs, most existing methods treat class labels as isolated, discrete entities, overlooking the rich semantic relationships between them. This oversimplified assumption limits the model's ability to capture hierarchical dependencies and inter-class correlations -- both critical for distinguishing visually similar categories. The problem is especially acute in fine-grained classification, where accurate recognition depends on understanding complex label semantics. To address this, we propose Structured-Condensed Prompt Tuning (SCPT), which enhances semantic structure modeling in prompt learning. Specifically, we introduce Semantic Relation Encoding (SRE) to explicitly model inter-class semantic topology and encode structured label relationships. In parallel, we design a Semantic Condensation loss (ScLoss) to suppress redundant supervision and extract discriminative components from the global semantic space. Together, these components significantly improve semantic alignment and fine-grained discrimination. Extensive experiments on 14 fine-grained benchmarks show that SCPT effectively mitigates semantic ambiguity and achieves state-of-the-art performance in both few-shot and base-to-novel generalization settings.

AI.tldr: SCPT通过结构化语义关系编码和语义凝聚损失，有效提升了CLIP等视觉语言模型在细粒度图像识别中的语义对齐能力，在14个细粒度基准上达到了少样本和base-to-novel泛化设定下的最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 细粒度图像识别依赖大量人工标注，成本高昂；虽然视觉语言模型（如CLIP）提供了零样本替代方案，但其捕捉细微类别差异的能力有限，性能不佳。现有的提示调优方法将类标签视为孤立的离散实体，忽略了类别间丰富的语义关系（如层次依赖和类间相关性），而这对区分视觉上相似的细粒度类别至关重要。
AI.method: 提出结构化压缩提示调优（SCPT），包含两个核心组件：语义关系编码（SRE）用于显式建模类间语义拓扑并编码结构化的标签关系；语义凝聚损失（ScLoss）用于抑制冗余监督信号，从全局语义空间中提取判别性成分，从而增强语义对齐与细粒度判别能力。
AI.result: 在14个细粒度基准数据集上的大量实验表明，SCPT有效缓解了语义歧义问题，在少样本学习和base-to-novel泛化设定下均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了结构化标签语义建模在细粒度视觉识别中的关键作用，证明了通过显式编码类别间关系并压缩冗余语义信息，可以显著提升视觉语言模型在有限标注条件下的识别效果，为提示学习在细粒度任务中的应用提供了新思路。

title: Finding H. pylori in the Fine Print: Evidence-Linked Multi-Agent Case Finding from Gastric Biopsy Reports
summary: Data from Singapore indicated that about 31% of the population had evidence of Helicobacter pylori infection. Persistent H. pylori infection is associated with chronic active gastritis and peptic ulcer disease, and its eradication is key to gastric cancer prevention. However, evidence supporting \textit{H. pylori} positivity and H. pylori-associated gastritis may be distributed across heterogeneous coded and free-text report fields and may require contextual interpretation of assertion and negation, limiting keyword search, and making manual review difficult to scale. We conducted a retrospective pilot evaluation of the Nimblemind Multi-Agent System (nMAS), a field-name-driven, evidence-linked extraction workflow, using 54 de-identified gastric biopsy pathology reports from a large healthcare system in Singapore. Four clinician-scoped binary fields were evaluated: gastric/stomach biopsy, biopsy status, H. pylori positivity, and H. pylori-associated gastritis. Across 216 feature-case decisions, nMAS correctly classified 213, corresponding to 98.61% overall accuracy. A separately implemented UMA-style MiniMax M2.5 comparator produced similar aggregate and per-field classification metrics. Although predictive performance was similar, nMAS maintained unified report-level outputs with supporting source sentences; the demonstrated contribution is therefore workflow integration and traceability rather than predictive superiority. Under an illustrative, unmeasured scenario, reviewing 1,000 reports at five minutes per manual review versus five seconds per evidence-linked verification would reduce review time from 83.3 to 1.4 staff-hours, corresponding to 81.9 staff-hours and about USD~6,100 in potential staff-time value. Larger multi-institutional studies should evaluate evidence-span correctness, clinician verification time, and generalizability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了一种基于字段名驱动、证据关联提取的Nimblemind多智能体系统（nMAS），用于从胃镜活检病理报告中自动提取幽门螺杆菌感染及相关胃炎的关键信息，在216项特征-病例决策中达到98.61%的准确率，并展示了显著的潜在工时节省效益。
AI.motivation: 幽门螺杆菌感染与慢性活动性胃炎、消化性溃疡及胃癌密切相关，但其病理报告中的关键信息分散于异构的编码和自由文本字段中，且需结合上下文判断肯定与否定语义，导致关键词搜索受限、人工审查难以规模化，亟需一种可解释、可追溯的自动化信息提取方法。
AI.method: 研究采用Nimblemind多智能体系统（nMAS），一种基于字段名驱动的证据链接式提取流程，对54份去标识化的胃镜活检病理报告进行回顾性评估；同时引入UMA风格的MiniMax M2.5模型作为对照，共评估胃/胃活检、活检状态、H. pylori阳性、H. pylori相关性胃炎四个临床二元字段。
AI.result: 在216项特征-病例决策中，nMAS正确分类213项，总体准确率达98.61%；对照的MiniMax M2.5模型在聚合与逐字段指标上表现相似；nMAS的优势在于提供统一的报告级输出并附带支持性源句，具有更强的可追溯性与工作流整合能力。
AI.conclusion: nMAS的主要贡献在于工作流集成与可追溯性，而非预测性能的优越性；在假设场景下，将1000份报告的人工审查时间从83.3工时降至1.4工时，可节省约81.9工时及约6,100美元的人力成本；未来需在多机构研究中验证证据跨度正确性、临床医生核查时间及泛化能力。

title: MoWorld: A Flash World Model
summary: The future of World Models depends not only on scaling model capability, but also on scaling practicality and inference efficiency. High-frame-rate inference enables responsive perception, planning, and control in real-world autonomous systems. To this end, we present MoWorld, a cost-effective yet high-performance Flash World Model with an end-to-end framework spanning data generation, pre-training, distillation, and efficient inference, enabling up to 50 FPS real-time interaction with cinematic visual quality without the need of high-end GPUs. To enable large-scale real-world deployment, MoWorld jointly optimizes model capability and cost throughout the entire development pipeline. Specifically, unlike existing approaches that primarily rely on large-scale video corpora, MoWorld is built upon a scalable 3D-native data engine accumulated from our large-scale 3D vision and generative modeling pipeline, enabling the efficient construction of geometrically consistent training data across diverse real-world and synthetic environments. Based on this foundation, a curriculum cross-frame pre-training strategy for stable and scalable World Model learning, an efficient denoising-step distillation algorithm to reduce diffusion training cost, and a mixed-precision parallel inference framework for low-cost real-time deployment. MoWorld is the first real-time interactive World Model built on the Neural Processing Unit (NPU) and can achieves up to 50 FPS in such the devices, enabling practical and efficient deployment at scale. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that MoWorld achieves leading performance; notably, its average inference cost is only 30\%-50\% of that of existing World Models, providing a practical foundation for large-scale real-world applications of World Models. We also demonstrate diverse applications of MoWorld.

AI.tldr: MoWorld 是一种基于 NPU 的高效闪存世界模型，通过端到端框架（包括 3D 原生数据引擎、课程跨帧预训练、去噪步蒸馏和混合精度并行推理）实现高达 50 FPS 的实时交互，推理成本仅为现有世界模型的 30%-50%，首次在 NPU 上实现可规模部署的实时交互式世界模型。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型主要依赖大规模视频语料库和高性能 GPU，导致模型能力与实用性、推理效率之间存在严重不平衡，难以在真实世界的大规模部署中实现高帧率实时感知、规划与控制。
AI.method: MoWorld 提出端到端框架，包括：(1) 基于大规模 3D 视觉与生成建模管线的可扩展 3D 原生数据引擎，高效构建几何一致的训练数据；(2) 课程式跨帧预训练策略实现稳定可扩展的世界模型学习；(3) 高效去噪步蒸馏算法降低扩散训练成本；(4) 混合精度并行推理框架支持低成本的实时部署，首次在 Neural Processing Unit (NPU) 上实现实时交互。
AI.result: MoWorld 在 NPU 上实现高达 50 FPS 的实时交互，无需高端 GPU；平均推理成本仅为现有世界模型的 30%-50%，同时保持领先的视觉质量和模型性能。
AI.conclusion: MoWorld 证明了通过端到端优化数据生成、训练、蒸馏和推理全流程，可以在低成本硬件上实现高性能实时世界模型，为世界模型在真实世界的大规模应用提供了实用化基础。

title: WING: A Window-Prior-Based Generative Network with Gated Inception for Cross-Modality CT Synthesis
summary: Generating CT volumes from MRI and CBCT can improve treatment planning in adaptive radiotherapy while avoiding additional radiation exposure. However, direct regression of CT intensities is challenged by the inherently high dynamic range and long-tailed distributions, thereby averaging out sparse yet clinically important structures. To alleviate this issue, we reformulate the regression target into multiple windowed representations, leveraging the inductive prior that CT intensities are structure-deterministic and window-separable. These windowed views exhibit smoother distributions and admit structured fusion back to the full-range CT. Building on this reformulation, we introduce WING, a WINdow-prior-based Generative network comprising: 1) a new Gated Inception Generator to produce multi-window predictions, enabling multi-shape kernel interactions to capture cross-modality correspondence; 2) a Fuse-and-Refine Transformer to aggregate the windowed outputs and learn residuals for detail refinement; and 3) a joint adversarial training objective to enhance window-conditioned realism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our compact WING achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MRI-to-CT and CBCT-to-CT benchmarks, while supporting multi-anatomy synthesis with a single model.

AI.tldr: WING是一种基于窗先验的生成网络，将CT强度回归任务重构为多窗表示预测与结构化融合，在MRI-to-CT和CBCT-to-CT基准上达到最优性能，并支持单模型多解剖结构合成。
AI.motivation: CT体素的直接回归受限于CT强度的高动态范围和长尾分布，导致模型倾向于平均化稀疏但临床重要的结构，如骨骼和植入物，从而影响自适应放疗中治疗计划的准确性。
AI.method: 提出WING框架，包括：1) 门控起始生成器（Gated Inception Generator），通过多形状核交互生成多窗预测；2) 融合与细化Transformer（Fuse-and-Refine Transformer），聚合窗级输出并学习残差进行细节精修；3) 联合对抗训练目标，增强窗条件化真实性。
AI.result: 在MRI-to-CT和CBCT-to-CT两个基准任务上，WING达到了当前最优性能，且单个模型即可支持多解剖结构的合成。
AI.conclusion: 利用CT强度结构确定性和窗可分离性的归纳偏置，将回归目标重构为多窗表示可有效缓解高动态范围带来的学习困难，为跨模态CT合成提供了新范式。

title: Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning for Multi Objective Battery Management in Dairy Farms
summary: The dairy industry in Ireland has a large potential for the integration of renewable energy and the reduction of carbon emissions. However, researchers of distributed generation control are mainly focused on residential and commercial applications. To contribute to the effective integration of renewable energy in the dairy sector, this paper presents a multi-objective optimisation control system based on differential evolution and multi agent Deep Reinforcement Learning. The proposed control is organised in two layers: the upper layer uses dynamic pricing, and the lower layer is based on multi-agent reinforcement learning for battery management. This paper also simulates the electrical response of the proposed control system in a rural distribution circuit. The simulation results show that the proposed control framework can improve profits from energy arbitrage up to 18% compared to using Rule-based models, increase the use of distributed generation without significantly increasing cost, and comply with the Irish grid code in terms of voltage variation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于差分进化与多智能体深度强化学习的双层优化控制框架，用于爱尔兰乳制品行业的可再生能源集成与电池管理，仿真结果表明该框架在能量套利、分布式发电利用和电网规范符合性方面均优于基于规则的模型。
AI.motivation: 爱尔兰乳制品行业具有巨大的可再生能源集成与碳减排潜力，然而现有分布式发电控制研究多集中于住宅和商业场景，缺乏针对乳制品行业的专门控制方案，因此需要设计适用于该行业的多目标优化控制系统以有效整合可再生能源。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种双层多目标优化控制系统：上层采用动态定价机制进行全局优化，下层基于多智能体深度强化学习实现电池储能管理；同时利用差分进化算法对整体控制策略进行优化，并在农村配电电路中对所提系统的电气响应进行了仿真验证。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，与基于规则的模型相比，所提控制框架在能量套利方面可提升高达18%的利润；在不显著增加成本的前提下提高了分布式发电的利用率；并且在电压波动方面完全符合爱尔兰电网规范。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了将差分进化与多智能体深度强化学习相结合的双层控制框架在乳制品行业可再生能源集成中的有效性，为面向特定工业场景的分布式发电控制提供了可行方案，未来可进一步推广至其他高能耗农业领域。

title: VendorBench-100: A Unified Cross-Paradigm Benchmark for Deepfake Image Detection
comment: 22 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/sharayu-20/vendorbench-100
summary: Deepfake image detection is currently served by three fundamentally different paradigms: commercial APIs, zero-shot vision-language models (LLMs), and open-source detectors. Despite their widespread use, these paradigms are rarely evaluated under a common protocol, making direct comparison difficult. We introduce VendorBench-100, a cross-paradigm benchmark that evaluates 36 representative models using a single adversarial 100-image corpus, a unified output schema, and a common evaluation framework. To ensure reliable assessment under the corpus's intentional class imbalance, models are ranked primarily by the Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC), with ROC-AUC reported as a threshold-independent measure of ranking ability. Rather than maximizing dataset size, VendorBench-100 emphasizes challenging real-world scenarios through a curated taxonomy of eight edge-case families, including face swaps, text-to-video stills, AI photo edits, avatar compositing, opaque-provenance images, and compressed research frames. Our evaluation shows that commercial APIs achieve the strongest median performance, followed by vision LLMs and open-source detectors. However, individual open-source models remain competitive with the best vision LLMs. More importantly, we identify a consistent divergence between ranking ability (ROC-AUC) and operating-point quality (MCC), demonstrating that strong score discrimination does not necessarily produce reliable default-threshold decisions. This metric disagreement, rather than any single leaderboard ranking, is the central finding of the benchmark. We release the complete evaluation framework and benchmark results to support reproducible future research. The source code and data are available at: https://github.com/sharayu-20/vendorbench-100

AI.tldr: VendorBench-100 是一个跨范式深度伪造图像检测基准，通过一个统一的100张对抗性图像语料库评估了36个模型（商业API、视觉LLM和开源检测器），发现商业API的中位性能最佳，但核心结论是模型在ROC-AUC（排序能力）与MCC（默认阈值决策质量）之间存在显著不一致，而非单一的排行榜排名。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造图像检测存在三种截然不同的范式（商业API、零样本视觉语言模型和开源检测器），但它们很少在统一协议下被评估，导致直接比较困难，缺乏一个公平、可复现且覆盖实际挑战场景的跨范式基准。
AI.method: 论文构建了 VendorBench-100 基准，包含一个精心设计的100张对抗性图像语料库，覆盖八类边缘场景（如换脸、文本到视频静帧、AI照片编辑、头像合成、来源不明图像及压缩研究帧）；采用统一输出模式和评估框架，以马修斯相关系数（MCC）为主排序指标，ROC-AUC 作为阈值无关的排序能力补充指标，以应对语料库中刻意引入的类别不平衡。
AI.result: 在36个模型的评估中，商业API实现了最强的中位性能，其次是视觉LLM和开源检测器；但个别开源模型性能可媲美最佳视觉LLM；更重要的是，模型在ROC-AUC（排序能力）与MCC（操作点质量）之间存在持续的分歧，表明强区分能力并不等价于可靠的默认阈值决策。
AI.conclusion: 该基准的核心发现并非某一类模型在排行榜上独占鳌头，而是揭示出排序能力（ROC-AUC）与默认阈值决策质量（MCC）之间的系统性不一致，这一指标分歧为深度伪造检测的实际部署提供了关键警示，即高ROC-AUC并不保证生产环境中的稳健决策。

title: Doomed from the Start: Early Abort of LLM Agent Episodes via a Recall-Controlled Probe Cascade
comment: 10 pages, 9 figures, 2 tables. Code will be released soon
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents solving multi-step tasks frequently commit to trajectories that are doomed to fail, yet continue to consume substantial inference compute before the failure becomes observable. We show that failure is predictable early from the agent's internal representations: lightweight per-round probes on hidden activations anticipate eventual episode failure as early as the first interaction round, where scorers reading only the agent's observable behavior are barely better than chance. We turn this signal into a practical abort cascade: one distribution-free calibrated gate per round, with per-round recall budgets jointly searched so that eventually-successful episodes survive all gates at a user-specified global rate; this episode-level guarantee is the one that matters in deployment, since false-abort risk accumulates across gates. Across two agent models on TextCraft, the cascade meets every recall target from 90% to 97% and, at the 90% target, saves 47.1% +/- 10.3% (Qwen-2.5-7B) and 37.2% +/- 8.8% (Llama-3.2-3B) of inference compute, 1.6--1.7x the best single-gate policy. An otherwise-identical cascade reading only behavior saves roughly half as much, and adding behavioral features to the probe yields no further gain: the hidden states capture what behavior reveals. Finally, we characterize the sample complexity of certifying high recall targets, telling practitioners which recall promises their data can, and provably cannot, back. The code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于LLM内部表征的早期失败预测方法，通过逐轮轻量探针在代理交互的早期阶段检测任务失败，并构建级联门控机制以在保证成功回合通过率的同时，显著节省推理计算资源。该方法在TextCraft上实现了47.1%和37.2%的推理计算节省，且仅基于行为信号的变体节省效果减半。
AI.motivation: LLM代理在执行多步任务时通常会陷入必然失败的轨迹，但在失败变得可观测之前仍会消耗大量推理计算资源，现有基于行为信号的早期预测方法在首个交互轮次几乎与随机猜测无异，存在显著的推理计算浪费问题。
AI.method: 提出一个逐轮筛选的"中止级联"框架：在代理的每一轮交互中，利用轻量级探针从隐藏层激活中提取内部表征以预测最终失败概率；使用无分布假设的校准门控逐轮判断是否提前中止；通过联合搜索各轮次的中止阈值以实现用户指定的全局成功回合通过率（即所有门控均放行的概率），从而在保证召回率的同时最大化计算节省。
AI.result: 在TextCraft上使用Qwen-2.5-7B和Llama-3.2-3B两种代理模型，级联框架在90%-97%的召回目标下均达标；在90%召回目标下分别节省47.1%±10.3%和37.2%±8.8%的推理计算量，相比最优单门控策略提升1.6-1.7倍；仅基于行为信号的变体节省效果减半，且向探针中添加行为特征无额外收益，表明隐藏状态已完全涵盖行为所揭示的信息。
AI.conclusion: LLM代理内部表征在极早期即可预测最终任务失败，且该信号优于可观测行为；多门控级联能够有效降低误杀累积风险，实现具有用户可控成功率的计算节省；此外，论文还刻画了在高召回目标下验证性能所需的数据量界，为实际部署提供了理论指导。

title: Bridging Diffusion Pruning and Step Distillation with Teacher-Aligned Repair
summary: Diffusion models generate high-quality images, but their inference cost comes from two sources: large denoising networks and repeated denoising steps. Existing compression pipelines usually attack these costs separately. Pruning reduces the network, but most pruning methods still rely on a long post-pruning retraining stage to recover a many-step sampler. Step distillation reduces the number of denoising steps, but it usually assumes a student that can already follow the teacher well enough to receive useful distillation gradients. This paper asks whether post-pruning retraining can be replaced by step distillation. We find that the direct replacement fails: after pruning an EDM2-XS teacher, starting SiDA from the pruned checkpoint produces unusable samples. We introduce a short teacher-alignment repair stage as a bridge between pruning and step distillation. The bridge matches the pruned generator to the teacher on noisy real-image latents, then hands the repaired checkpoint to one-step distillation. On ImageNet-512, the original EDM2-XS baseline uses 124.713M parameters and 63 network evaluations, reaching an FID of 3.53. With a suitable distillation objective, our 20% pruned one-step generator uses 98.826M parameters and one network evaluation, reaching an FID of 3.12. With 30% pruning, the model uses 88.029M parameters and one network evaluation, with an FID of 4.26.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为SiDA的框架，通过将剪枝与步骤蒸馏相结合，并用一个简短的教师对齐修复阶段作为桥梁，替代了传统剪枝后冗长的重训练过程，在ImageNet-512上实现了一步骤生成且性能优于原模型。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型推理成本高昂，源于大尺寸去噪网络和多次去噪步骤。现有压缩方案通常分别处理这两个问题：剪枝缩减网络但需冗长的重训练恢复多步采样，步骤蒸馏减少步数但要求学生已能很好地跟随教师。本文旨在探索能否用步骤蒸馏替代剪枝后的重训练，以同时压缩网络规模和采样步数。
AI.method: 提出SiDA（Step-distillation after Pruning）框架。首先对预训练扩散模型（EDM2-XS）进行剪枝以缩减网络规模；然后引入一个简短的教师对齐修复阶段（teacher-alignment repair stage），将剪枝后的生成器与教师在含噪真实图像潜变量上对齐，作为剪枝与步骤蒸馏之间的桥梁；最后使用修复后的检查点进行一步骤蒸馏，获得一个单步生成器。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-512上，原始EDM2-XS基线使用124.713M参数和63次网络评估，FID为3.53。经20%剪枝后，SiDA的一步骤生成器使用98.826M参数和1次网络评估，FID达到3.12，优于基线。30%剪枝后使用88.029M参数和1次网络评估，FID为4.26。
AI.conclusion: 直接以剪枝后检查点初始化步骤蒸馏会导致生成失败，而通过短期的教师对齐修复作为桥梁，可以有效替代冗长的剪枝后重训练，同时实现网络剪枝和步骤蒸馏的协同压缩，在参数更少、采样步骤仅一步的情况下获得优于原始多步基线的生成质量。

title: Bridging Physical Reasoning and Task Generalization via Visual Action Outcome Reasoning Alignment
comment: ICML'26 Workshop RLxF: Reinforcement Learning from World Feedback
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to generalize in interactive physical reasoning, particularly under unseen tasks and environments. Two key failure modes are prominent: hallucinated chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that contradicts physical reality, and misalignment between the model's reasoning and actions. We present VAORA (Visual Action Outcome Reasoning Alignment), a novel reward design that directly addresses both issues. VAORA introduces two complementary rewards: Visual Alignment Reward, which anchors VLM reasoning to the visual context independent of the agent action itself, and Visual-Action Alignment Reward, which grounds reasoning in the visual outcome induced by the model's action. Together, these rewards suppress hallucinated CoT and reduce the gap between reasoning and behavior. To improve training stability, we further employ smooth, dense rewards by estimating success probabilities using a pre-trained in-domain expert agent. Experiments on PHYRE and Virtual Tool support our performances across novel-task and unseen-environment settings, confirming that grounded and generalizable physical intelligence can be induced through VAORA.

AI.tldr: 提出VAORA奖励设计方法，通过视觉对齐奖励和视觉-动作对齐奖励两种互补奖励机制，分别抑制幻觉式思维链推理并缩小推理与行为之间的差距，在PHYRE和Virtual Tool基准上提升了视觉语言模型在未见任务和环境中的交互式物理推理泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在交互式物理推理中面临泛化困难，尤其是在未见任务和未见环境场景下，存在两个关键失败模式：一是产生与物理现实矛盾的幻觉式思维链推理，二是模型的推理与实际行动之间的不对齐。
AI.method: 提出VAORA框架，包含两种互补奖励：视觉对齐奖励将VLM的推理锚定在视觉上下文中而不依赖智能体动作本身，视觉-动作对齐奖励则基于模型动作引发的视觉结果来 grounding 推理过程。为提升训练稳定性，进一步利用预训练的领域内专家智能体估计成功概率，构建平滑的稠密奖励。
AI.result: 在PHYRE和Virtual Tool基准上的实验表明，VAORA在未见任务和未见环境设置下均优于对比方法，验证了该方法能够使VLM获得可泛化的、基于物理世界的具身推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过VAORA的奖励设计，可以有效抑制幻觉式思维链并缩小推理与行为之间的差距，从而在视觉语言模型中诱导出具备泛化能力的物理智能，为提升VLM在物理交互任务中的鲁棒性和可泛化性提供了有效路径。

title: Generalized Synthetic Image Detection with Enhanced RGB-Noise Representation Learning
summary: The rapid advancement of large-scale generative models has accelerated the spread of highly deceptive AI-generated images, making generalized synthetic image detection a critical imperative. Existing forensic networks often struggle with cross-model generalization and realworld degradations due to their reliance on single-domain representations and conventional binary classification optimization. To overcome these limitations, we propose RNSIDNet, a novel forensic framework that achieves robust detection through enhanced RGB-Noise representation learning. Specifically, our method employs a dual-branch architecture where global RGB semantics, extracted by an attention-refined CLIP backbone, dynamically modulate highfrequency noise artifacts captured by Bayar convolutions via a Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) module. To further enhance the learned representations, we design a Hard Sample-aware Contrastive Learning (HSCL) strategy. By explicitly penalizing challenging training samples, HSCL reshapes the latent feature space to maximize the discriminative margin between pristine and synthetic domains. Extensive experiments across eight public benchmark datasets verify that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering superior generalization ability, robustness, and computational efficiency. Code and dataset will be publicly available on https://github.com/multimediaFor/RNSIDNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RNSIDNet，一种基于增强型RGB-噪声表示学习的鲁棒检测框架，通过双分支架构（CLIP全局语义+Bayar卷积高频噪声）与难样本感知对比学习策略，在八个公开数据集上实现了泛化性、鲁棒性和计算效率均最优的AI生成图像检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有取证网络由于依赖单一域表示和传统二分类优化，在面对跨模型泛化以及真实世界退化（如压缩、噪声等）时性能严重下降，亟需一种能克服上述局限的鲁棒通用合成图像检测方法。
AI.method: 提出RNSIDNet，采用双分支架构：一个分支使用注意力精炼的CLIP骨干网络提取全局RGB语义表示，另一分支通过Bayar卷积捕获高频噪声伪影；借助特征级线性调制（FiLM）模块使全局语义动态调制噪声特征；并设计难样本感知对比学习（HSCL）策略，通过显式惩罚困难训练样本来重塑潜在特征空间，最大化真实域与合成域之间的判别边界。
AI.result: 在八个公开基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，RNSIDNet在跨模型泛化能力和面对真实世界退化时的鲁棒性方面均达到最先进水平，同时具备较高的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了多模态（RGB+噪声）表示学习与难样本对比学习相结合能够显著提升合成图像检测的泛化能力和鲁棒性，为面向实际应用的通用取证系统提供了有效技术路径。

title: DepthWeave-KV: Token-Adaptive Cross-Layer Residual Factorization for Long-Context KV Cache Compression
summary: Long-context language model inference is increasingly limited by the memory bandwidth and capacity required to store key-value caches, yet existing compression methods often apply uniform budgets across layers or tokens and degrade retrieval when lexical cues and semantic states require different preservation. We introduce DepthWeave-KV, a token-adaptive cache compression method that factorizes key and value states across neighboring transformer layers using shared low-rank channel bases while retaining lightweight token-specific residuals where attention behavior is sensitive. DepthWeave-KV combines cross-depth residual factorization with a token-conditional depth router that allocates higher reconstruction rank to instruction-bearing and retrieval-critical tokens, and uses calibration-free online error tracking from attention-output probes to adapt compression during generation without retraining the base model. A fused CUDA implementation jointly performs basis lookup, residual dequantization, and attention projection to reduce decode-time memory traffic. Across LongBench, Needle-in-a-Haystack, L-Eval, and long-form QA and summarization benchmarks, DepthWeave-KV achieves near-full-cache task quality with substantially lower memory use, improving average score and retrieval accuracy over prior compressed caches while reaching 8.3x KV memory reduction and 72.8 tokens per second at 64K context.

AI.tldr: DepthWeave-KV是一种令牌自适应的键值缓存压缩方法，通过跨层低秩基分解和令牌特定残差保留，在64K上下文下实现8.3倍KV内存缩减和72.8 tokens/s解码速度，同时保持接近完整缓存的任务质量。
AI.motivation: 长上下文语言模型推理日益受到存储键值缓存所需内存带宽和容量的限制，现有压缩方法通常在各层或各令牌间使用统一预算，当词汇线索和语义状态需要不同的保留程度时，检索性能会下降。
AI.method: DepthWeave-KV采用Token自适应的缓存压缩方法，将相邻Transformer层的键值状态分解为共享的低秩通道基，同时在注意力行为敏感的位置保留轻量级令牌特定残差；结合跨深度残差因子分解与令牌条件深度路由器，为指令承载和检索关键令牌分配更高的重构秩；使用基于注意力输出探针的免校准在线误差跟踪，在推理过程中自适应调整压缩而无需重训练基础模型；并实现融合CUDA内核联合执行基查找、残差反量化和注意力投影以减少解码时的内存流量。
AI.result: 在LongBench、Needle-in-a-Haystack、L-Eval以及长文本问答和摘要基准上，DepthWeave-KV以显著更低的内存使用实现了接近完整缓存的任务质量，相比先前的压缩缓存方法在平均得分和检索准确率上均有提升，在64K上下文下达到8.3倍KV内存缩减和72.8 tokens/s的解码速度。
AI.conclusion: DepthWeave-KV表明，通过令牌自适应的跨层因子分解和在线误差跟踪，可以在大幅压缩KV缓存的同时保持对检索关键令牌的高保真度，为长上下文推理中的高效内存管理提供了可行的无重训练方案。

title: TMF-RSE: Tri-Modal Fusion with Regional Semantics and Evidential Uncertainty for Lung Severity Scoring
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. IEEE conference format (IEEEtran). Submitted to AVSS 2026. Tri-modal fusion for lung severity scoring using appearance, segmentation, and VLM semantics with evidential uncertainty
summary: Accurate quantification of lung disease severity from chest imaging is critical for clinical decision-making and resource allocation. We propose a tri-modal deep learning framework, TMF-RSE (Tri-Modal Fusion with Regional Semantics and Evidential Uncertainty), that combines appearance features from two-dimensional chest inputs, structural features from lung segmentation masks, and semantic features from vision-language models (VLMs) for severity quantification. Our approach employs complementary fusion mechanisms that integrate semantic guidance, structural priors, and hierarchical interactions across modalities. The model employs evidential regression to provide both severity predictions and uncertainty estimates. Experiments on the Per-COVID-19 CT and RALO datasets show that TMF-RSE outperforms recent transformer-based baselines, achieving MAE of 4.02 and Pearson correlation of 0.9629 on Per-COVID-19 validation, and 0.339 MAE / 0.973 PC on RALO geographic extent.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种三模态深度学习框架TMF-RSE，结合胸部CT图像的外观特征、分割掩膜的结构特征和视觉语言模型的语义特征，通过互补融合机制与证据回归实现肺部疾病严重程度的精确量化与不确定性估计，在Per-COVID-19和RALO数据集上显著优于现有Transformer基线模型。
AI.motivation: 胸部影像中肺部疾病严重程度的精确量化对于临床决策和资源配置至关重要，现有方法未能充分融合不同模态的互补信息，且缺乏对预测不确定性的可靠估计，限制了其在关键临床场景中的可信度与实用性。
AI.method: 提出TMF-RSE框架，采用三模态输入：二维胸部CT的外观特征、肺部分割掩膜的结构特征以及视觉语言模型的语义特征；通过互补融合机制实现语义引导、结构先验与跨模态层次化交互，并采用证据回归（evidential regression）同时输出严重程度预测值与对应的不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在Per-COVID-19 CT数据集验证集上，TMF-RSE达到MAE 4.02和Pearson相关系数0.9629；在RALO数据集的地理范围预测任务上达到MAE 0.339和Pearson相关系数0.973，大幅超越近期基于Transformer的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，融合外观、结构和语义三种模态的互补信息并引入证据回归进行不确定性建模，能够显著提升肺部疾病严重程度量化的准确性和可靠性，为临床决策提供了更具可解释性和可信度的辅助工具。

title: VaseMuseum: Digital Intelligent Museum for Ancient Greek Pottery
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have made interactive digital museums increasingly feasible by connecting 3D digitization with natural-language artifact exploration. However, in cultural heritage domains such as ancient Greek pottery, reliable VLM assistance is limited by two challenges. First, open-ended interpretation requires grounding fine-grained 2D/3D visual evidence in specialized curatorial knowledge, yet the retrieval process may introduce weak sources and unverifiable references. Second, when the available evidence is incomplete, noisy, or ambiguous, VLMs often produce confident but unsupported answers instead of calibrated uncertainty. To address these challenges, we propose VaseMuseum, a lightweight and modular multimodal agent framework for intelligent digital museums of ancient Greek pottery. VaseMuseum combines an interactive virtual museum with VaseAgent, which supports both 2D images and 3D artifacts through multimodal perception, 3D-aware reasoning, external knowledge retrieval, and inference-time reliability control. Specifically, VaseAgent retrieves evidence from authoritative web and museum knowledge sources, and source-level control selects diverse and verifiable evidence before generation. Meanwhile, response-level control checks generated claims against the evidence pool and encourages neutral, evidence-bounded answers when support is insufficient or conflicting. Moreover, a training-free GRPO-style selection mechanism favors responses with valid references and calibrated confidence without updating the VLM backbone. Experiments in a realistic digital museum simulation show that VaseMuseum improves citation validity, reduces hallucinations on knowledge-intensive queries, and produces more neutral answers under ambiguity compared with search-enabled VLM baselines.

AI.tldr: VaseMuseum 提出了一种轻量级模块化多模态智能体框架，通过源级与响应级可控证据检索以及训练自由的 GRPO 式选择机制，在古希腊陶器数字博物馆场景中有效减少幻觉、提升引用有效性并生成更中立的模糊性回答。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在文化遗产领域（如古希腊陶器）面临两大挑战：一是开放解释需要将细粒度2D/3D视觉证据与专业策展知识关联，但检索过程可能引入弱来源和不可验证的引用；二是当证据不完整、有噪声或模糊时，VLM 常产生自信但无依据的回答而非校准的不确定性。
AI.method: VaseMuseum 结合交互式虚拟博物馆与 VaseAgent 智能体，VaseAgent 集成多模态感知、3D 感知推理、外部知识检索与推理时可靠性控制。具体包括：源级控制从权威网络和博物馆知识源检索并筛选多样可验证证据，响应级控制将生成声明与证据池比对并鼓励中性、有边界答案，以及一种训练自由的 GRPO 式选择机制，在不更新 VLM 骨干的前提下优先选择具有有效引用和校准置信度的响应。
AI.result: 在真实数字博物馆仿真实验中，VaseMuseum 相比启用搜索的 VLM 基线，在知识密集型查询上提升了引用有效性，减少了幻觉，并在模糊情境下生成更中立的答案。
AI.conclusion: VaseMuseum 证明，结合源级与响应级证据控制及训练自由的选择机制，可以有效提升 VLM 在专业领域（如文化遗产）中的可信度与可靠性，为构建可验证、不确定度校准的数字博物馆智能助手提供了可行路径。

title: FADRA: Frequency-Aware Diffusion with Residual Adaptation for Video Face Restoration
summary: Video face restoration (VFR) aims to recover high-quality and temporally consistent facial details from severely degraded video sequences; however, existing methods still struggle to balance spatial fidelity and temporal coherence under complex degradations. To address this, we propose FADRA, a frequency-aware diffusion framework with iterative residual adaptation specifically tailored for robust VFR. We first leverage the strong temporal consistency of a pre-trained text-to-video diffusion model and introduce lightweight LoRA adapters together with a Low-Quality (LQ) Pixel-Alignment Feature Fusion module to efficiently adapt the frozen generative prior to the VFR task. To further adapt the frozen diffusion backbone to the downstream VFR task beyond LoRA-based adaptation, we introduce a Repeated Residual Adaptation Head (RRAH) for step-wise residual refinement after the diffusion backbone. To make this refinement explicitly guided by the degraded observation, RRAH further takes the LQ latent together with the current velocity prediction as input, allowing the model to repeatedly revisit LQ cues and predict residual updates at each flow-matching step. This LQ-guided repeated residual adaptation helps recover fine facial details while preserving the inherent temporal priors of the pre-trained model. Furthermore, to ensure the structural integrity of perceptually important details, we introduce a Frequency-Aware Loss that provides explicit supervision across multiple spectral bands, emphasizing visually sensitive frequency components that are crucial for perceptual quality and prone to temporal jittering. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FADRA recovers better facial structures and produces more temporally consistent videos than state-of-the-art methods, leading to clear gains in both quantitative metrics and visual perception.

AI.tldr: 提出FADRA，一种面向视频人脸复原的频率感知扩散框架，通过轻量LoRA适配器、LQ像素对齐特征融合模块、重复残差适配头（RRAH）和频率感知损失，在复杂退化条件下实现了高质量空间细节与时间一致性的平衡，在定量指标和视觉感知上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频人脸复原（VFR）方法在复杂退化条件下难以兼顾空间保真度与时间一致性，如何有效利用预训练模型的时序先验并适配到VFR任务中仍是一个挑战。
AI.method: FADRA基于预训练的文生视频扩散模型，引入轻量LoRA适配器和低质量（LQ）像素对齐特征融合模块，高效地将冻结的生成先验适配到VFR任务；进一步提出重复残差适配头（RRAH），在扩散主干之后进行逐步残差精炼，通过将LQ潜变量与当前速度预测共同输入，使模型在每个流匹配步骤中反复回看LQ线索并预测残差更新；同时引入频率感知损失，在多频谱带上提供显式监督以增强感知重要细节的结构完整性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，FADRA在恢复更好的人脸结构和生成更时间一致的视频方面优于现有最先进方法，在定量指标和视觉感知上均取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: LQ引导的重复残差适配能够有效恢复精细人脸细节同时保留预训练模型的时序先验，频率感知损失对提升感知质量与抑制时间抖动至关重要，该框架为视频人脸复原中的时空一致性建模提供了新的思路。

title: What Images Cannot Say: Language-Guided Olfactory Representation Learning
summary: Images tell us what a scene looks like, but rarely what it would feel like to be there. While recent datasets pair visual scenes with electronic-nose measurements, aligning smell signals with images remains challenging because many olfactory cues arise from contextual environmental factors that are not directly visible in pixels. We introduce SCENT, a multimodal framework that uses language guidance as a semantic bridge between vision and olfaction. Our approach leverages Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to generate scene descriptors capturing objects, environmental context, and plausible ambient smell cues suggested by the visual scene. These descriptors provide semantic guidance for learning olfactory representations. We train a smell encoder that maps electronic-nose signals into a shared embedding space aligned with both visual and textual representations, and introduce a languageguided latent decomposition that separates object-specific odors from contextual environmental contributions. Experiments on the New York Smells dataset demonstrate that SCENT significantly improves crossmodal retrieval compared to vision-only baselines, achieving state-of-theart performance on smell-to-image and smell-to-text retrieval tasks. In addition, our framework produces interpretable olfactory representations that enable the disentanglement of complex smell mixtures. Our results reveal the importance of contextual semantic information for grounding olfactory perception in multimodal learning and pave the way for future research in this area.

AI.tldr: SCENT是一个多模态框架，利用语言作为视觉与嗅觉之间的语义桥梁，通过视觉-语言模型生成场景描述来指导嗅觉表示学习，并在纽约气味数据集上实现了跨模态检索的最先进性能，同时支持嗅觉表示的可解释性分解。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-嗅觉配对数据集缺乏有效的对齐方法，原因在于许多嗅觉线索来自场景中不可直接见于像素的上下文环境因素，而传统视觉仅基线方法难以捕捉这些隐含气味信息。
AI.method: SCENT框架使用视觉-语言模型（VLMs）生成包含物体、环境上下文和合理气味线索的场景描述，以此作为语义桥梁；训练一个气味编码器将电子鼻信号映射到与视觉和文本表示对齐的共享嵌入空间，并提出语言引导的潜在分解方法将物体特定气味与环境上下文贡献分离开来。
AI.result: 在New York Smells数据集上，SCENT在气味到图像和气味到文本的跨模态检索任务中均超越了视觉仅基线方法，达到了最先进性能；同时实现了复杂气味混合的可解释性分解。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明上下文语义信息对于在多模态学习中锚定嗅觉感知至关重要，为未来嗅觉与视觉联合理解的研究方向奠定了基础。

title: Temporal Modeling of Optically Variable Devices in Identity Documents
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Document Analysis and Recognition (ICDAR 2026)
summary: Robust remote verification of identity documents relies on analyzing faint, transparent security features like Optically Variable Devices (OVDs), or "holograms", within user-captured videos under uncontrolled conditions. Current systems, however, face critical limitations: existing methods often treat video frames in isolation, neglecting the intrinsic dynamic nature of OVDs and leaving systems vulnerable to swapping attacks, or focus on general holographic presence and lack the ability to verify specific OVD types. Moreover, the economic infeasibility of frame-by-frame video annotation makes supervised training impractical. In this work, we introduce two novel approaches for verifying the dynamic behavior of transparent OVDs protecting the holder's portrait, specifically designed for open-set scenarios where attack types are unknown during training. We demonstrate that these approaches can be trained without any attack samples in a self-supervised setting, surpassing previous state-of-the-art methods on public datasets while adhering strictly to industrial constraints. Our results confirm that modeling temporal dynamics is essential for defeating sophisticated attacks under realistic conditions, and underscores the promise of sequence modeling and anomaly detection for OVD verification. Code is available at https://github.com/EPITAResearchLab/pouliquen.26.icdar.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种无需攻击样本的自监督方法，通过对透明OVD（全息图）的动态行为建模来验证身份文档的真实性，在开放场景下超越了现有最先进方法，并证明时序建模对抵御复杂伪造攻击至关重要。
AI.motivation: 现有身份文档远程验证系统在分析用户拍摄视频中的透明光学可变器件（OVD/全息图）时存在三个关键局限：现有方法通常将视频帧独立处理，忽略了OVD固有的动态特性，导致易受交换攻击；多数方法仅检测全息图是否存在，无法验证特定OVD类型；帧级视频标注在经济上不可行，使得监督训练难以实际应用。
AI.method: 本文针对保护人像的透明OVD动态行为验证，提出两种新颖的自监督方法，无需任何攻击样本即可训练，专门面向攻击类型未知的开放场景；方法通过对视频帧序列的时序动态建模来实现OVD类型识别与异常检测，核心思想是利用序列建模和异常检测技术替代有监督的帧级标注方案。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验结果表明，两种方法均超越了此前最先进的技术水平，且严格遵守实际工业部署的限制条件；结果证实了建模时序动态特征对于在真实条件下击败复杂伪造攻击的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了时序建模和异常检测方法在OVD验证中的有效性，其自监督训练范式解决了有监督标注不可行的实际难题，为在非受控环境下实现鲁棒的证件远程验证提供了新的可行路径。

title: Analysis-by-Proxy: Localization Signals in VLMs Operating as Condition Encoders
comment: Accepted as a Spotlight at the ICML 2026 Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly utilized as the conditioning backbone for diffusion-based image editing due to their remarkable multimodal reasoning capabilities. While standalone VLMs demonstrate strong localization capabilities, editing pipelines frequently struggle to maintain this accuracy, particularly in complex, multi-entity scenes. In this work, we investigate this performance gap, hypothesizing that it stems from treating the VLM as a condition encoder. In this role, the model is restricted to a single forward pass, preventing the autoregressive generation process for which it was optimized, thereby failing to fully expose its capabilities. To investigate whether this spatial understanding persists when the VLM is used as a condition encoder, we introduce Analysis-by-Proxy. In this framework, we train a lightweight, interpretable proxy model on the VLM's intermediate representations using an auxiliary localization task. By analyzing the VLM through this proxy, we uncover the specific VLM representations that encode localization information. Our findings expose a fundamental mismatch between how spatial knowledge is represented within a VLM condition encoder and how it is extracted by current editing pipelines. We reveal that under single-pass constraints, the localization signal does not reliably propagate to the predefined layer configurations commonly used for conditioning. Instead, this crucial signal remains hidden within intermediate representations, at locations that vary depending on the input prompt. Using our introduced Analysis-by-Proxy framework, we reveal the fundamental failures of existing condition extraction strategies in editing pipelines, opening the door to more principled design of conditioning architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Analysis-by-Proxy框架，通过训练轻量级代理模型分析VLM的中间表征，揭示了当前扩散图像编辑流水线中将VLM作为条件编码器时存在的空间定位信息丢失问题——单次前向传播下的定位信号无法可靠传播到预设条件层，而是隐藏在随输入变化的中间表征中。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLM具有强大的多模态推理与定位能力，现有的基于扩散模型的图像编辑流水线在复杂多实体场景中难以保持这种定位精度。本文假设该性能差距源于将VLM作为条件编码器使用——仅进行单次前向传播，限制了模型本应为自回归生成优化的能力，从而无法充分利用其定位能力。
AI.method: 本文提出了Analysis-by-Proxy框架，通过训练一个轻量级、可解释的代理模型，在辅助定位任务上对VLM的中间表征进行分析，从而探测VLM在作为条件编码器时其空间理解能力是否仍然保留。该方法揭示了VLM中编码定位信息的具体表征层及其在不同输入提示下的分布变化。
AI.result: 实验发现，在单次前向传播约束下，VLM的定位信号无法可靠地传播到当前编辑流水线常用的预设条件层配置中；相反，这些关键的定位信息隐藏于中间表征中，且其所在位置随输入提示动态变化。这揭示了现有条件提取策略的根本性失败。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLM作为条件编码器时与编辑流水线之间存在根本性的表征不匹配问题，表明当前基于固定层配置的条件提取策略存在固有缺陷，为更原理性地设计条件架构开辟了方向。

title: Verification of Dynamic Holographic Behavior in Identity Documents
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Document Analysis and Recognition (ICDAR 2025)
summary: This paper addresses the remote verification of the authenticity of Optically Variable Devices (commonly known as holograms) on identity documents. Typically placed over the cardholder's photo, these devices provide strong and easily verifiable security for human inspection but pose challenges for automated verification. Existing approaches easily cover static frauds (e.g. paper photocopy) and can be evaluated for such, but their capacity to detect real, dynamic fraud cases (e.g. handcrafted hologram) has not been evaluated to date because of the lack of public datasets. Furthermore, they are usually trained to detect known attack types, and few of them can generalize to new, unseen attacks. This work features three contributions to address these limitations: 1) a new public dataset, MIDV-DynAttack, which extends the existing MIDV-Holo dataset with realistic, static and dynamic attacks against identity document specimens, tripling the number of attack samples compared to the original dataset, 2) a novel verification method which can assess the authenticity of a specific hologram thanks to the analysis of its dynamic behavior and appearance, can be trained without dynamic attack samples, and exhibits new state-of-the-art performance, 3) a benchmark of existing approaches which follows a clear evaluation protocol and emphasizes the inability of other approaches to deal with dynamic attacks, as well as new challenging attacks to deal with. Code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/EPITAResearchLab/pouliquen.25.icdar.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MIDV-DynAttack数据集以解决全息图动态攻击检测缺乏公开数据的问题，并设计了一种无需动态攻击样本训练即可验证光学可变器件真伪的新方法，在标准评估协议下达到了最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有身份文档全息图自动验证方法主要针对静态伪造（如纸质复印件）进行评估，缺乏对真实动态攻击（如手工制作的全息图）的检测能力评估，原因在于缺少公开数据集；同时，这些方法通常仅能检测已知攻击类型，难以泛化至未知的新型攻击。
AI.method: 本文提出三方面贡献：1）构建MIDV-DynAttack数据集，在MIDV-Holo基础上扩展了真实静态与动态攻击样本，将攻击样本数量增至原来的三倍；2）提出一种新颖的全息图验证方法，通过分析全息图的动态行为与外观特征来判断真伪，且无需动态攻击样本即可完成训练；3）建立并公开了一套清晰的评估协议，用于基准测试现有方法。
AI.result: 所提方法在标准评估协议下达到了新的最先进性能；基准测试结果表明，现有方法无法有效应对动态攻击以及新的具有挑战性的攻击类型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过公开数据集、标准评估协议和无需动态攻击样本训练的新验证方法，填补了全息图动态攻击检测领域的空白，强调了现有方法在动态攻击泛化能力上的不足，并为该方向后续研究提供了基础设施和基准。

title: A VLM-Enhanced Framework for Comprehensive Traffic Sign Condition Assessment Integrating Daytime Visual Performance and Nighttime Retroreflectivity Evaluation
comment: 21 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Preprint. An earlier version of this work was presented at the 105th Annual Meeting of the Transportation Research Board (TRB), January 2026
summary: Traffic signs are crucial components of road safety, serving as visual tools under all lighting conditions. The Manual on Uniform Traffic Control Devices (MUTCD) specifies daytime visual factors such as legibility and color contrast, and nighttime retroreflectivity requirements. Traditional assessment methods rely on manual inspections, which the Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) notes are subjective, labor-intensive and pose safety concerns, while retroreflectometers are expensive and unaffordable for smaller agencies. Most existing studies focus on either daytime factors or nighttime retroreflectivity but rarely integrate both aspects comprehensively. This study develops a novel framework that systematically evaluates traffic signs through integrated daytime-nighttime assessment. The methodology employs three fine-tuned Vision Language Models (VLMs) for daytime visual performance assessment across four key factors: legibility, color, surface and shape integrity, and surrounding environment conditions. VLM predictions are converted to numerical scores through sentiment analysis and Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) scoring, while nighttime performance is assessed using LiDAR-derived retroreflectivity following established calibration procedures. The framework integrates these components into a comprehensive Sign Condition Index (SCI) for maintenance guidance. Evaluation results demonstrated that LLaVA and Qwen outperformed InternVL, achieving bidirectional cosine similarity scores of 0.67-0.76 across all factors. Among 462 validated traffic signs, 68 were flagged by the proposed framework as requiring immediate replacement due to inadequate retroreflectivity performance.
